prompts.author: @MayorKingAI
prompts.text: FORMAT: 15s / 15 SHOTS / chaotic daily routine synced to the beat SUBJECT: @image1 [add your character] STYLE: High-end stylized 3D animated character, cinematic lighting, expressive face, polished materials, exaggerated but believable motion, comedic visual storytelling. WARDROBE: Blue striped pajamas in shots 1–9. Changing into work clothes in shots 10–11. Dark business suit, white shirt, tie, and dress shoes in shots 12–15. Final shot: still wearing the same wet suit. ENVIRONMENT: Small bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, rainy street, bus stop, office, dark bedroom at the end. MOOD: Chaotic, rushed, unlucky, comedic frustration, ending in emotional defeat. SHOT 1: ECU, 85mm push-in / Smartphone alarm on messy bedside table, screen shows 8:00. SHOT 2: MCU, handheld 50mm / He wakes up in pajamas, slaps the alarm off, says: “Oh shit.” SHOT 3: MCU, 50mm slide / In the bathroom, still in pajamas, he splashes water on his face, but it is too hot and burns his eyes. SHOT 4: Fridge interior shot, 24mm / Still in pajamas, he opens the fridge and sees almost nothing except a jar of peanut butter. SHOT 5: Front medium shot, 50mm / He stares at the empty fridge, then grabs the peanut butter. SHOT 6: Detail close-up, 85mm / Two slices of toast pop up burnt. SHOT 7: MCU, 50mm / He spreads peanut butter on the burnt toast and takes one rushed bite. SHOT 8: MCU, handheld 50mm / Back in the bathroom, still in pajamas, he grabs the toothbrush and toothpaste in a hurry. SHOT 9: Detail close-up, 85mm / He squeezes too hard and toothpaste shoots onto his face before brushing. SHOT 10: Top-down detail shot, 35mm / He starts putting on suit pants while standing on one leg. SHOT 11: MS, handheld 35mm / Still on one leg, he loses balance and crashes to the floor. SHOT 12: WS, 24mm tracking / Now fully dressed in suit and tie, he runs into pouring rain and chases the bus. SHOT 13: MS, 50mm tracking / Still in the wet suit, he watches the bus disappear and mutters: “Oh no, not again.” SHOT 14: Low-angle OTS from desk, 50mm snap push / At the office, still wet, he sits at the computer. The boss looms over him and says: “You’re fired.” SHOT 15: WS, 35mm fast push-in / Back home, still wearing the same wet suit, he enters his dark bedroom and throws himself face-first onto the bed.

prompts.author: @ritesh_ai
prompts.text: STYLE Futuristic retail meets street realism. Shot like a real-world viral moment — busy, imperfect, layered with background life. Digital elements feel physical — weight, resistance, light spill. Color palette: warm market tones (fabric stalls, skin, sunlight) contrasted with cool digital screen glow. Hyper-detailed textures: screen glare, fingerprints, fabric weave, subtle dust in air. MOTION Shot 1 — Establish Market Energy 35mm handheld — crowded street market, people moving in all directions. Camera weaving through bodies, slightly obstructed view, natural chaos. Digital screen stands among stalls — vertical, clean, out of place. Shot 2 — Approach + Interaction Camera settles as she steps into frame. Medium shot — she pauses in front of the screen. Subtle curiosity, not exaggerated. She lifts her hand and scrolls — screen reacts instantly with smooth UI motion. Shot 3 — Dress Appears Close on screen — a dress rotates slowly, fabric simulation realistic, light catching folds. Her reflection faintly visible on glass surface. She pauses scroll. Hand hovers. Shot 4 — Pull Through Moment (Hero Action) She reaches forward — fingers touch screen surface. There’s slight resistance — like pushing into liquid glass. Fingers pass through. She grips the dress fabric and pulls it outward — fabric emerges from screen with weight and drag. Screen surface distorts slightly around her arm. Camera moves closer instinctively, slight shake — reacting to the impossibility. Shot 5 — Instant Wear Transition As she pulls the dress fully out — quick motion across her body. Seamless transformation: Current outfit transitions into the pulled dress mid-motion — not a flash cut, but a continuous morph tied to fabric movement. Cloth settles naturally on her body — gravity, folds, tension all realistic. Shot 6 — Screen Aftermath Cut to screen — now blank. Only faint glow, subtle reflections of market behind. No UI, no content — completely empty. Shot 7 — Walk Away (Fashion Beat) She turns and walks into the market wearing the dress. Camera follows briefly — people pass, no one reacts. Fabric moves naturally with her steps — wind interaction, slight friction sounds. Shot 8 — Loop Closure Beat Camera drifts back to the screen as another passerby steps in. Hand reaches toward the blank display. Just before touch — frame aligns compositionally with earlier interaction moment. AUDIO Market ambience: chatter, footsteps, vendors calling, distant traffic. Screen interaction: soft digital hum, subtle tactile “pressure” sound when hand enters. Fabric pull: light tension + release sound. After transformation: ambience returns fully, grounding the moment. No music initially. Light ambient tone fades in during transformation — subtle, not cinematic. CAMERA 35mm / 50mm handheld Natural human movement — slight imperfections always present Push-ins motivated by curiosity, not perfection No overly smooth gimbal feel Transitions driven by action (hand movement, fabric pull, body turn) FRAME RATE 24fps, natural motion blur. LIGHTING Late afternoon market light — warm, slightly directional. Digital screen emits cool, soft glow that reflects on her skin during interaction. Post-transformation: lighting returns fully natural. SUBJECT Confident but grounded. Reacts minimally — curiosity > shock. Movement clean, intentional — fashion presence without over-performance. PROP — DIGITAL SCREEN Slim vertical display, slightly worn edges (not futuristic perfection). Glass surface shows fingerprints, smudges. When interacted with: behaves like a flexible membrane — subtle distortion, not sci-fi flashy.

prompts.text: 10) A powerful aquatic warrior riding a massive orca, long hair flowing in water, wearing sleek ocean armor. She holds a large ancient trident, glowing faintly, her expression focused and intense. 0-3s Wide underwater shot. She rides the orca at high speed through deep ocean. Light rays cutting through water. Tension building. 3-5s A gigantic megalodon emerges from darkness, rushing toward them. Massive jaws opening. Camera whip pans as the orca dodges at the last second. 5-7s She stands slightly on the orca. Raises the trident. Water around begins to vibrate. 7-9s Energy build-up. Ocean currents spiral toward the trident. Bubbles, particles, and pressure distortions intensify. Camera tight orbit around her. 9-11s Slow motion peak. Everything slows. The trident now blazing with concentrated ocean energy. Even the megalodon slows as it charges. 11-12.5s She thrusts the trident forward. Energy compresses into a focused point. 12.5-14s Massive release. A colossal water-energy beam explodes forward. Shockwave tears through the ocean. The megalodon is hit directly—body violently ripped apart. 14-15s Aftermath. Water calms slowly. Fragments drifting. She lowers the trident, still on the orca, dominant and still. Camera fluid tracking, aggressive orbit, slow motion compression, impact push forward Scene deep ocean, strong volumetric light, heavy particles, pressure waves, large-scale underwater environment Style ultra realistic, cinematic underwater VFX, massive energy build-up and release, hollywood epic scale, powerful visual clarity, no distortion, no stretching

prompts.author: @j_smeaton99
prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 on @yapper_so Prompt; Ultra-realistic cinematic night sequence, shallow depth of field, neon bokeh reflecting on wet pavement, atmospheric subway-street setting. A stylish young woman in her early 20s walks along a lively night street near a subway entrance. She has shoulder-length dark hair slightly moving in the breeze, expressive eyes, subtle makeup, confident yet relaxed presence. Medium close-up framing. She holds a bright orange smartphone in one hand while casually carrying a white coffee cup in the other. Streetlights, restaurant signs, and passing traffic cast soft orange-teal reflections across her face. The city ambience feels alive — distant chatter, neon signage, taxis passing, steam rising from subway vents. Camera remains steady in a smooth forward tracking shot. No cuts, no zoom. Cinematic lighting, shallow focus isolating the subject from the vibrant night background. Without warning, a deep metallic vibration echoes beneath the street. The pavement begins to tremble. A massive circular underground hatch violently blasts upward from the asphalt, spinning into the air as sparks and dust scatter across the street. Pedestrians panic and scatter in confusion while the woman pauses, calmly looking upward with curiosity rather than fear. The metal hatch slams back down with tremendous force. The street fractures open, concrete splitting apart. From the underground tunnel emerges a gigantic alien creature — roughly elephant-sized, with biomechanical skin patterns, glowing internal veins, and a threatening stance as it climbs out of the shattered roadway. Extreme close-up of the creature’s face: textured alien skin, mechanical muscle fibers moving beneath the surface, heavy breathing and glowing eyes. Cut to an extreme close-up of the woman’s face — composed, focused, completely fearless. She slowly pockets her phone and tosses the coffee cup aside. Instantly, a futuristic combat suit begins assembling across her body — sleek white armor forming piece by piece with micro-mechanical precision. Glowing icy-blue energy lines run through the suit as crystalline frost particles swirl around her. The helmet forms with a reflective visor and luminous accents. The alien charges forward, smashing parked cars and pushing taxis aside, causing destruction across the street. At the last possible moment, she vanishes in a flash of freezing energy — a teleport burst of shimmering ice particles. She reappears behind the creature mid-motion. The creature turns — and she delivers a devastating punch. Extreme hyper slow-motion impact shot: shockwaves ripple across the alien’s face, skin deforming under the force, fragments and particles bursting outward with dramatic motion blur. Hero Moment: The woman floats mid-air in a powerful superhero stance, surrounded by swirling frozen debris and luminous ice shards. The alien creature shatters into fragments around her, illuminated by neon reflections and cold blue energy. The camera slowly orbits around her, maintaining cinematic framing as ice particles drift through the air and reflect the city lights. She gently descends back to the street with controlled precision. As her feet touch the ground, the white combat armor dissolves into glowing particles that fade away, restoring her normal appearance seamlessly. She straightens her jacket slightly, regains her relaxed posture, and resumes walking down the neon-lit street as if nothing happened. Around her, stunned pedestrians stand frozen in disbelief, silently watching her disappear into the glowing night city. Cinematic ending, soft ambient city sound, the mysterious hero walking calmly into the distance.

prompts.author: @WolfRiccardo
prompts.text: 10-second cinematic video, nighttime in an empty USA intersection at a red traffic light. A black superbike is stopped at the line. The rider is an Asian female sport model wearing a full assassin-style black riding suit, sleek armored leather, dark visor helmet, intimidating and calm presence. No other cars or pedestrians anywhere on the street except one vintage convertible that slowly pulls up beside her. The convertible has exactly 5 men with different faces, hairstyles, tattoos, and gangster aesthetics, seated clearly in a clean arrangement: 2 in the front seats, 3 in the back seats. The car is blasting loud retro gangster hip-hop music. One man turns toward the biker and says in English: “Lady, wanna race?” The men laugh loudly. The woman does not smile, does not speak, completely expressionless, only staring forward. The men become slightly uneasy. The same man says in English: “Then when it turns green, the race begins.” They laugh again, but more nervously. Cinematic setup shots build tension: close-ups of the biker’s gloved hand gripping the throttle, the convertible engine rumbling, the men smirking, tattoos, chrome details, wheels, exhaust vibration, the woman’s still body posture, subtle heat distortion, low-angle hero shots, dramatic side profile shots, dashboard reflections, red traffic light glowing overhead. Rich cinematic color grading, moody contrast, high-end anamorphic look, realistic lighting, sharp composition, premium action-film atmosphere. Camera focuses intensely on the traffic light. The exact moment the light turns green, the biker launches with an absurd supernatural sonic-speed burst, like a magical shockwave explosion of air and light, disappearing from frame instantly in less than a blink, leaving dust, smoke, light streaks, and a violent pressure wave. The camera remains mostly fixed after her disappearance. Focus shifts back to the 5 men in the convertible, all reacting in stunned silence and disbelief, shocked and confused. The moment is both cinematic and slightly funny. Hyper-realistic, dynamic camera language, dramatic pacing, ultra-detailed, clean background, no traffic, no extra people, no chaos beyond the shockwave. Style tags: cinematic, action movie, dramatic tension, realistic, anamorphic lens, moody lighting, premium color grading, dynamic close-ups, ultra-detailed, humorous payoff, supernatural speed effect

prompts.text: SUBJECTS: Character: a young Chinese dim sum shop girl, delicate chibi proportions, refined and cute facial features but with a tense expression, slightly furrowed brows and rapid breathing, carrying a clear sense of pressure and a hint of fear; short hair slightly flipped outward, moving with high-speed motion; wearing a light-colored traditional Chinese short jacket and apron Monster: a “giant shrimp dumpling creature”, semi-translucent soft white body, clearly defined folds, the front constantly opening into a huge soft mouth, with steam churning inside ENVIRONMENT: daytime Chinese main street with a single deep axis; starting point is the open entrance of a Cantonese dim sum shop, the street progresses through a mixed vendor area → lantern alley → roof drying area → the same teahouse facade; endpoint is an outward-extending wooden balcony of the teahouse; cloth ropes always exist and connect both sides of the eaves; no pedestrians throughout STYLE: plasticine animation style, glossy textures, consistent material rendering across every frame SHOT 1: Medium shot, 35mm, side tracking / The girl bursts out at high speed from the dark entrance of the dim sum shop, tense expression, fast step frequency; the shrimp dumpling creature springs out from the same space, compresses on landing and instantly launches into pursuit, mouth wide open, repeatedly lunging forward but always just missing / SFX: rapid footsteps, soft-body compression, biting airflow SHOT 2: Continuous. Low angle, 28mm, forward push / She sprints forward and leaps onto a stall, using rebound force to propel herself ahead; the creature closely follows, repeatedly bouncing and knocking over a soup noodle stand, broth spilling widely across the ground forming a slippery area, while its open mouth nearly reaches her back but still fails to touch / SFX: rebound impact, stall overturning, liquid splashing SHOT 3: Continuous. Medium shot, 35mm / She enters the lantern alley, steps onto the spilled broth and slides at high speed, forced to lean forward to control balance while continuing to sprint; the creature enters the same slippery zone, slides briefly then immediately compresses and rebounds, lunging from behind but still missing by a small margin / SFX: sliding friction, steam burst SHOT 4: Continuous. Medium close-up, 50mm, forward push / She jumps onto the roof into the drying area, grabs the continuously present cloth rope and swings at high speed across a gap before releasing forward; the shrimp dumpling creature slams into the roof, flattens on impact, then instantly rebounds and lunges again / SFX: rope tension, soft-body squash SHOT 5: Continuous. Medium close-up, 50mm, forward follow / Upon landing, she realizes the creature is already close, abruptly stops and turns, forced to change direction, sprinting straight toward the teahouse facade; she plants a foot on a pillar, uses it for a second burst upward, grabs a beam, flips and lands onto the wooden balcony; meanwhile the creature below completes an extreme compression and immediately launches upward in pursuit, nearly passing under her feet / SFX: powerful push-off, pillar step, air rush SHOT 6: Close-up push-in, 50mm / Just as she exhales in relief, the creature below completes its maximum compression and releases its strongest jump, its huge soft mouth fully open upward in a bite, missing by only a tiny distance; she jerks backward to dodge as the screen cuts to black / SFX: extreme rebound, biting airflow

prompts.author: @AIwithSarah_
prompts.text: Dark realistic tokusatsu transformation on an apocalyptic battlefield. A gloomy heroine in the reference image with a torn wasteland dress stands under a gray-blue sky filled with smoke and flying demons. A matte metal ring with a golden crystal on her finger. Single continuous shot, handheld, cinematic IMAX style. She slowly raises her hand-eyes suddenly glow white-gold, cracking with light. She shouts: "Henshin!" The crystal shatters-blue energy erupts. Shockwaves distort the air. Her body tears apart-red smoke, blue lightning, golden particles spreading across her flesh. Clothes burn away. Biological armor grows like iridescent scales. Metal plates collide with sparks. A golden mask forms unevenly-compound eyes flicker to life. Final form: flame-gold Thunder Dragon armor, glowing cracks, horned helmet, unstable energy pulsing. She lowers into a fighting stance-draws a lightning blade from her hand. Instant burst forward-ground shatters, explosions everywhere.

prompts.author: @mehvishs25
prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 Prompt on @yapper_so SUBJECT A lean, martial-arts–trained chef with sharp facial structure and closely cropped hair. His wardrobe blends a contemporary Chinese chef uniform with kung-fu training gear: a sleeveless fitted top with a mandarin collar in dark matte fabric that catches light subtly, forearms wrapped with cloth bands for grip and control, loose tapered trousers allowing deep stances, and soft kitchen shoes suited for silent movement. His body proportions emphasize long limbs and flexible wrists; elbows deliver explosive strikes. Every action follows a deliberate combat rhythm—brief stillness, sudden acceleration, then a locked finish—supported by grounded stances and fast pivoting footwork. ENVIRONMENT A traditional Chinese open-flame cooking station. An iron wok rests permanently on the burner. A polished metal counter reflects the warm lighting. A blue-and-white porcelain bowl sits centered in the foreground. Lighting combines warm overhead illumination with strong flickering firelight from the stove. Thin oil smoke drifts through the air while heat shimmer subtly distorts the background. MOOD Focused intensity. Movements feel disciplined, aggressive, and precise—closer to a martial performance than casual cooking. Nothing chaotic; every motion feels intentional and controlled. TIMELINE 0:00–0:02 Extreme close-up from a wide POV. The chef stands behind the counter, which remains between him and the camera. He steps forward, compresses his posture, then sharply lifts his head and locks eyes with the lens. Both hands grip a mass of dough. With one clean pull he stretches it outward, folds it once, then pulls again. The dough begins separating into a small set of evenly forming strands. 0:02–0:05 Cut with slight handheld energy. The chef keeps the noodle bundle under full control between both hands. Through smooth fold → align → stretch movements he extends the strands into clean parallel lines. Roughly 8–12 thin noodles arc outward and sweep close past the lens. He completes the final stretch and lays the aligned noodle bundle neatly onto the counter. 0:05–0:07 Camera shifts with a brief recoil before stabilizing. The chef glides sideways behind the counter. One palm sweeps across the surface, sending shrimp and greens into the air and directly into the waiting wok. The wok never leaves the stove; he grips only the handle. Any stray ingredient is intercepted and redirected smoothly into the pan. 0:07–0:10 Single continuous shot. The chef manipulates the wok entirely through wrist control and momentum. No hands enter the pan. He lifts, tilts, and snaps the wok so the ingredients rise, spin, and land back inside. His elbow strikes the stove edge—sparks scatter briefly. He presses the wok down into the flame, then pulls upward, drawing the fire into a second controlled flare. 0:10–0:12 Match-movement tracking shot. Still gripping the wok handle, he pivots his stance. With his free hand he retrieves the noodle bundle from the counter and drops it into the wok in one clean motion. He immediately resumes tossing: three crisp cycles—fast → faster → sudden stop. Shrimp, greens, and noodles visibly combine while sauce coats everything evenly. 0:12–0:15 Cut to a steady POV. Total stillness. The chef tilts the wok and slides the finished dish into the porcelain bowl—revealing glossy noodles, plump shrimp, and vibrant greens. He lifts the bowl toward the camera until it fills the frame. One finger taps the rim, creating a faint vibration. Steam rises quickly and expands until it completely fogs the lens, ending in a soft fade.

Movements feel disciplined, aggressive, and precise—closer to a martial performance than casual cooking. Nothing chaotic; every motion feels intentional and controlled. TIMELINE 0:00–0:02 Extreme close-up from a wide POV. The chef stands behind the counter, which remains between him and the camera. He steps forward, compresses his posture, then sharply lifts his head and locks eyes with the lens. Both hands grip a mass of dough. With one clean pull he stretches it outward, folds it once, then pulls again. The dough begins separating into a small set of evenly forming strands. 0:02–0:05 Cut with slight handheld energy. The chef keeps the noodle bundle under full control between both hands. Through smooth fold → align → stretch movements he extends the strands into clean parallel lines. Roughly 8–12 thin noodles arc outward and sweep close past the lens. He completes the final stretch and lays the aligned noodle bundle neatly onto the counter. 0:05–0:07 Camera shifts with a brief recoil before stabilizing. The chef glides sideways behind the counter. One palm sweeps across the surface, sending shrimp and greens into the air and directly into the waiting wok. The wok never leaves the stove; he grips only the handle. Any stray ingredient is intercepted and redirected smoothly into the pan. 0:07–0:10 Single continuous shot. The chef manipulates the wok entirely through wrist control and momentum. No hands enter the pan. He lifts, tilts, and snaps the wok so the ingredients rise, spin, and land back inside. His elbow strikes the stove edge—sparks scatter briefly. He presses the wok down into the flame, then pulls upward, drawing the fire into a second controlled flare. 0:10–0:12 Match-movement tracking shot. Still gripping the wok handle, he pivots his stance. With his free hand he retrieves the noodle bundle from the counter and drops it into the wok in one clean motion. He immediately resumes tossing: three crisp cycles—fast → faster → sudden stop. Shrimp, greens, and noodles visibly combine while sauce coats everything evenly. 0:12–0:15 Cut to a steady POV. Total stillness. The chef tilts the wok and slides the finished dish into the porcelain bowl—revealing glossy noodles, plump shrimp, and vibrant greens. He lifts the bowl toward the camera until it fills the frame. One finger taps the rim, creating a faint vibration. Steam rises quickly and expands until it completely fogs the lens, ending in a soft fade.

prompts.text: Ultra-realistic cinematic desert chase, grounded physics, natural lighting, volumetric dust, high-detail sand simulation, 8K quality, IMAX-level realism, physically accurate motion blur. TIMELINE 0.0 – 1.0 Extreme low-angle close-up near the desert surface. A powerful black warhorse sprints at full speed. Hooves strike dense sand, sending particles exploding backward with force. Camera stays tight on the legs to emphasize speed and impact. Audio: Sharp hoofbeats, strong wind, sand friction. No music. 1.0 – 2.0 Camera moves in a smooth orbit from the side to behind the horse’s tail. The rider leans forward aggressively. Clothes flap violently, hair whipped by the wind. Dust streaks past the camera. Audio: Faster hoofbeats, stronger wind gusts. 2.0 – 3.0 The desert light suddenly darkens. The air begins to vibrate slightly. Fine sand lifts and moves across the ground. Tension builds naturally in the environment. The rider remains focused and steady. 3.0 – 4.5 The desert ahead erupts violently, like an earthquake. The ground shakes hard, launching sand into storm clouds. A powerful shockwave hits. The camera shakes intensely. The horse jolts and lets out a terrified neigh. A massive flying desert serpent begins to emerge through the sandstorm. Audio: Deep low-frequency rumble, violent wind, sand impacts, horse cry. No music. 4.5 – 6.0 Camera follows the giant serpent as it rises into the sky. Its long body moves smoothly with realistic weight. The sun creates a dramatic silhouette behind it. Sand swirls violently around its body. The rider steadies the horse and looks upward. 6.0 – 7.5 Close-up of the rider’s face. His head is tilted upward, eyes tracking the serpent high in the sky. Neck muscles tense, sand brushing across his skin. Expression shows shock, awe, and determination. The horse breathes heavily, nostrils flaring. 7.5 – 8.5 The rider continues looking upward and calmly whispers: “Let’s go.” Natural lip-sync, subtle and realistic. 8.5 – 10.0 The rider pushes the horse into maximum speed. The warhorse sprints powerfully, sand blasting backward. The serpent begins a slow, controlled descent. Its tail moves with heavy, natural motion—no aggressive movement. 10.0 – 12.0 The serpent’s tail becomes clearly visible ahead. The rider chases at full speed. A long dust trail forms behind like a cinematic smoke plume. The serpent glides smoothly with realistic weight. 12.0 – 15.0 The serpent’s tail continues moving forward in a steady glide. Its scale and weight remain consistent and believable. The horse and rider maintain full speed. Sunlight cuts through the sandstorm, creating strong shadows and dramatic lighting. The chase continues with relentless intensity and cinematic realism. AUDIO RULE No music at any point Only natural sound: wind, sand, hoofbeats, ground rumble, creature movement QUALITY TAGS ultra realistic, cinematic lighting, volumetric dust, physically accurate motion, grounded physics, high dynamic range, film quality, no cartoon motion

Focus on the intricate fabric simulation and solid body collision.SHOT 1 (0-3 sec) Extreme close-up• camera_movement: handheld, sharp zoom out, whip pan right• main action: Handheld camera (that's where the camera is). Close-up of a human eye in a glowing crown. Flash causes hyperrealistic constriction of the pupil. Sharp zoom out: young woman stands static in a fashionable cloak as blurred assistants run past. Whip pan right. Audio: noise, flash-explosion triggers a heavy techno beat.SHOT 2 (3-7 sec) Medium shot• camera_movement: handheld, static shot• main action: The frame overlap is synchronized with the rhythm. A young woman in a heavy red rope dress throws her head back sharply; the ropes whip (complex fabric simulation). Shot of a girl with liquid glass skin in a vinyl coat. A blurred assistant splashes water on her neck (viscous fluid behavior). Audio: the whistling of the rope, the hissing of the splashes, a pulsating bass.SHOT 3 (7-10 sec) Medium shot• camera_movement: tracking the frame back• main action: The camera tracks the frame back in a concrete corridor (exactly where the camera is). Faceless latex girls in gold corsets march perfectly. A blurred assistant knocks over a heavy metal clothes hanger. The models step over it flawlessly; the main model's heel crushes the metal hanger. Audio: click of heels, hanger falling, crunch of hanger synchronized to the rhythm.SHOT 4 (10-13 sec) Medium shot• camera_movement: orbit left, high speed• main_action: A model in a massive pink latex down jacket pushes back a heavy black curtain (an elaborate imitation of fabric), revealing the blinding light of the catwalk. Audio: velvet whistle, roar of the crowd, growing bass.SHOT 5 (13-15 sec) Worm's eye view• camera_movement: static shot• main_action: A model with a chrome face made of liquid metal in a silver tent emerges from the blinding light. prompts.text: Global Quality Control: Photorealistic real-world aesthetic, ultra-detailed, 8K textures, realistic physical destruction, cinematic lighting and shadows, volumetric smoke, dynamic flames, particle debris system, HDR, high contrast, handheld camera feel, authentic lens shake, motion blur, shallow depth of field, apocalyptic atmosphere, 9:16 aspect ratio, fast-paced editing, no establishing shots/filler footage. Mutant Crab Design (Enhanced Sense of Oppression): Size: Far exceeds skyscrapers (the camera perspective must consistently emphasize this scale). Shell: Wet and reflective surface + scratches + scorch marks. Claws: Massive and razor-sharp; the clamping motion conveys the impact of "heavy objects colliding." Mouthparts: Multi-layered structure; chewing action involves both tearing and pulverizing. Movement: Each step generates ground tremors + shockwaves of dust. Shot Sequence: Shot 1 (0–1.5 seconds | Extreme Hook | Low-Angle) Ground-level low-angle shot + handheld camera shake. Foreground: Shattered streets, burning vehicles, and fleeing crowds rushing past the camera. The camera whips upward— A colossal mutant crab emerges oppressively from between the high-rises (it must not enter the scene slowly). Core Action (Must be rapid): The crab's claw descends directly from the top of the frame. It clamps down on a building → the structure instantly buckles → after a 0.2-second delay, it snaps apart. It hoists the section upward → and thrusts it directly into its maw to be crushed. Simultaneously: Humans fall from high altitudes (tumbling and struggling). Details: Delayed shattering of glass. Explosive diffusion of dust clouds. Flames whipped about by air currents. This shot must be an "explosion of visual information"—there can be no pauses. Shot 2 (1.5–3 seconds | High-Speed Conflict) High-speed lateral tracking shot; a fighter jet flies hugging the buildings (extreme low altitude). Missile Launch: Trailing exhaust plumes. A slight camera shake at the moment of launch. Impact on the Crab: The screen briefly flashes/overexposes. A shockwave blasts the smoke outward. Once the smoke clears: Shell shows only faint scorch marks (high contrast) Shot 3 (3–5 seconds | Explosive Thrill) Rapid cut to close-up Before the crab strikes: A 0.2-second preparatory muscle-tensing motion Then: Instantly crushes a fighter jet (completed within 0.3 seconds); fuselage deforms; delayed explosion (more realistic); explosive impact effect; slight camera shake Shot 4 (5–7 seconds | Immersive POV) First-person perspective (POV) Running for dear life: Violent camera shaking + simulated breathing effect Behind the subject: The crab’s massive claw slams into the ground The ground first buckles inward Then shatters outward A shockwave sends the person flying Vehicles tumble and skid; debris goes flying Shot 5 (7–9 seconds | Viral Moment) Camera pulls back rapidly, then pushes back in The crab’s two claws each grasp a skyscraper Enhanced Details: Unequal weight on each side → slightly unbalanced movement Snapping the buildings like "breaking a snack bar" Steel rebar stretches and bends Flames erupt from within the structures Shot 6 (9–11 seconds | Oppressive Climax) Extreme close-up The Crab’s Eyes: Reflecting the burning city Subtle tremors Tiny body vibrations driven by its breathing Final Ending (Core Interactive Moment) The crab suddenly locks onto the camera Charges forward at extreme speed (intense motion blur) Massive claws fill the entire frame Screen Effects: Cracks burst outward from the center White flash + screen shake Instant blackout (hard cut) Key Parameters: Instant hook, fast pacing, no idle frames, continuous destruction, extreme scale contrast, immersive POV, chaotic motion, cinematic realism, viral visual shock

prompts.text: { "style": "stylized 3D animation, hyperreal pop, squash-and-stretch", "mood": "fast slapstick mischief with fake wins and payoff", "characters": { "child": "round-faced, huge eyes, golden-blond ponytail, pink striped dress", "vendor": "tall man, curled mustache, crimson vest, tilted cap, brass ice cream paddle" }, "environment": { "location": "sunlit stone courtyard in hillside town", "details": "flower archways, mosaic fountain, brass cart, cobblestones, warm late-afternoon light" }, "timeline": [ { "time": "0:00-0:04", "action": "Ice cream trick reveals fake outs; cone appears and disappears, quick miss gag", "sfx": "gasp, whoosh, chuckle, bell" }, { "time": "0:04-0:09", "action": "Switch trick, scramble chase, fake victory then cone removed", "sfx": "swish, skid, laughter, chime cut" }, { "time": "0:09-0:15", "action": "Public tease, then real cone given; calm payoff and taste moment", "sfx": "crowd laugh, bell, soft chime, applause" } ] } stolen from: Seedance 2.0 Prompt: FORMAT: 15s / MULTI-CUT / 6 BEATS / HIGH-VIRAL COMEDIC PAYOFF SUBJECTS: A small round-faced figure with huge eyes, copper-red pigtails, a yellow polka-dot dress, and exaggerated cartoon proportions. A tall ice cream vendor with a curled mustache, crimson vest, tilted cap, and a long brass paddle carrying elastic white ice cream. Stylized 3D animation with rounded shapes and squash-and-stretch. ENVIRONMENT: A sunlit stone courtyard in an old hillside town with flower-draped archways, a mosaic fountain, ceramic bowls, and a brass ice cream cart with copper bells. Late afternoon light creates warm highlights on cobblestone. MOOD: Fast slapstick mischief with instant hooks, fake wins, and a crowd-pleasing payoff. COLOR LOGIC: Hyperreal Pop Look TIMELINE: 0:00-0:02: The Scroll Stop. Extreme close-up, 50mm. Huge eyes reflect a spinning white scoop, then pull fast to a wide shot, 35mm, revealing the figure frozen mid-skid as the vendor presents the brass paddle like a stage trick. SFX: sharp gasp, bell flutter, fountain splash. 0:02-0:04: Match cut into The First Miss. Close-up, 50mm. Hands clap shut on empty air as the cone snaps upward. The face stays frozen while the pupils tilt up. SFX: quick whoosh, soft clap, tiny squeak, crowd chuckle. 0:04-0:07: Cut on action into The Side Switch. Medium wide shot, 35mm. The vendor slides the paddle behind his back and pops the cone out on the other side. The figure lunges left, scrambles right, and pinwheels in place. A tea glass rattles on a nearby table. SFX: paddle swishes, shoe skids, glass clink, growing laughter. 0:07-0:09: Reaction cut into The Fake Victory. Medium close-up, 50mm. The cone lands in the waiting hand and the face bursts into victory, then the vendor peels the stretchy scoop away in one smooth move, leaving the cone bare for a beat. SFX: victory chime cut short, peel wobble, laughter pop, offended inhale. 0:09-0:11: Insert cut into The Public Humiliation. Insert shot of a ceramic cat staring from a shelf. Smash cut to a medium shot, 35mm, as the figure sags into noodle posture, then puffs both cheeks and folds both arms while onlookers bounce with silent laughter. SFX: tiny huff, crowd laughter swell, cart bell tinkle. 0:11-0:15: Whip pan transition into The Real Win. Medium close-up, 50mm. The vendor kneels and places the cone gently into the waiting hand with no trick this time. One still beat. The figure looks down, eyes sparkle, then the camera pulls back to a wide shot, 35mm, as the figure leans in for the first taste and the courtyard breaks into applause. SFX: soft handoff, held-breath pause, bright chime bloom, applause burst, warm music lift.

COLOR LOGIC: Hyperreal Pop Look TIMELINE: 0:00-0:02: The Scroll Stop. Extreme close-up, 50mm. Huge eyes reflect a spinning white scoop, then pull fast to a wide shot, 35mm, revealing the figure frozen mid-skid as the vendor presents the brass paddle like a stage trick. SFX: sharp gasp, bell flutter, fountain splash. 0:02-0:04: Match cut into The First Miss. Close-up, 50mm. Hands clap shut on empty air as the cone snaps upward. The face stays frozen while the pupils tilt up. SFX: quick whoosh, soft clap, tiny squeak, crowd chuckle. 0:04-0:07: Cut on action into The Side Switch. Medium wide shot, 35mm. The vendor slides the paddle behind his back and pops the cone out on the other side. The figure lunges left, scrambles right, and pinwheels in place. A tea glass rattles on a nearby table. SFX: paddle swishes, shoe skids, glass clink, growing laughter. 0:07-0:09: Reaction cut into The Fake Victory. Medium close-up, 50mm. The cone lands in the waiting hand and the face bursts into victory, then the vendor peels the stretchy scoop away in one smooth move, leaving the cone bare for a beat. SFX: victory chime cut short, peel wobble, laughter pop, offended inhale. 0:09-0:11: Insert cut into The Public Humiliation. Insert shot of a ceramic cat staring from a shelf. Smash cut to a medium shot, 35mm, as the figure sags into noodle posture, then puffs both cheeks and folds both arms while onlookers bounce with silent laughter. SFX: tiny huff, crowd laughter swell, cart bell tinkle. 0:11-0:15: Whip pan transition into The Real Win. Medium close-up, 50mm. The vendor kneels and places the cone gently into the waiting hand with no trick this time. One still beat. The figure looks down, eyes sparkle, then the camera pulls back to a wide shot, 35mm, as the figure leans in for the first taste and the courtyard breaks into applause. SFX: soft handoff, held-breath pause, bright chime bloom, applause burst, warm music lift.

prompts.text: The prompt for the trailer created with Seedance 2.0: Cinematic Horror Zombie Movie Trailer Style: Dark desaturated color grading, dramatic cinematic lighting, 24fps film grain, Hollywood blockbuster intensity. [0s–2s] Sweeping aerial shot descending over a devastated burning city at twilight. Crumbling skyscrapers, thick black smoke, distant explosions flashing across the horizon. Ash and red haze filling the sky. [2s–4s] Hard cut to medium close-up of a battle-worn male survivor standing on a rooftop gripping a shotgun. Face smeared with blood and dirt, staring down at the chaos below, speaking through gritted teeth. [4s–6s] Smash cut to street-level tracking shot racing through a destroyed avenue. Overturned burning military vehicles. A squad of armed survivors sprinting through wreckage, firing rifles behind them as a massive zombie horde crashes through a barricade. [6s–8s] Quick cut to low-angle action shot of a female soldier sliding across the hood of a wrecked car. Firing dual pistols into a wave of zombies lunging from all sides. Shell casings flying. [8s–10s] Cut to extreme close-up of a zombie's decayed face snapping toward camera with a guttural scream. Rapid pull-back revealing thousands of zombies flooding through collapsed city walls like a tidal wave, overwhelming military blockades. [10s–12s] Cut to dark bunker interior with flickering red emergency lights. A military commander slamming his fist on a table covered in maps. [12s–14s] Smash cut to rapid-fire montage: Explosions. Helicopter spiraling down. Zombies climbing skyscrapers. Survivor swinging an axe. Buildings collapsing in dust clouds. Each shot half a second. [14s–15s] Hard cut to black silence. Title CALL OF THE DEAD slams onto screen in cracked blood-red font. Single zombie growl echoes.

prompts.text: Dramatic low-angle tracking shot speeding along rain-slicked train tracks through a narrow mountain gorge. Dark rocky cliff walls rise on both sides, with overhead bridges and power lines crossing above. Moody overcast sky. The camera rushes forward at high speed. Two women — one with pink hair in all-black tactical gear, the other in a white bodysuit — fight on top of the moving train, exchanging martial arts blows as sparks fly. Dynamic action choreography, dark teal-grey color grade, cinematic speed and motion blur, sci-fi action film aesthetic. LOCURA!

prompts.author: @Preda2005
prompts.text: A high-energy fifteen-second continuous single-take visual effects short. A lone surfer rides atop a massive translucent light-whale, diving through a vast floating ocean suspended in the sky. Music is ethereal electronic pulses, each beat synchronized with visual shifts. Physical continuity is absolutely clear. The light-whale's body flows like liquid glass, with shifting bioluminescent currents pulsing within. Camera starts at an ultra-low angle rushing toward the surfer's feet, the crystalline board slicing through suspended water, droplets arcing outward in curved trajectories. The surfer's toes grip the board, every muscle twitch visible. Camera climbs rapidly up the whale's glowing spine. Its skin is transparent like, internal light pulsing like breath. Camera cuts hard to an extreme close-up of the surfer's face—only eyes and brow, background dissolved into light streaks. Wind pressure flutters her eyelashes, pupils slightly contracted from speed. Her gaze is intense and alive. They plunge downward through layers of floating water-islands and suspended tides. Camera whips right, capturing them skimming between two colossal floating coral structures, their surfaces pulsing with slow light. Slow motion activates: jellyfish the size of buildings drift past the lens, tentacles stretching into silk-thin trails of light. The surfer shifts weight on the crystalline board, carving along the whale's twisting back. The whale begins a spiraling dive through vertical suspended currents. Camera orbits them at high speed, rotation synchronized with the spiral, the floating ocean background stretching into cyan and gold light bands. The whale's eye now forms—not a traditional eyeball, but every bioluminescent vein in its body suddenly converging toward its head, forming an incandescent core of light. The core contracts then expands, like a pupil focusing. Camera cuts hard to an extreme close-up of this light-core. It is gazing at the surfer, as if checking she is safe. They burst through a dense field of glowing plankton. Particles explode outward, trailing behind like stardust. The whale breaches a suspended waterfall, the water body shattering into billions of floating droplets. Super slow motion: every droplet hangs frozen mid-air, refracting golden sunlight, the surfer's hair leaving a reflection on each droplet's surface. The surfer flips her body, threading through a gap barely wide enough for one person between two converging tidal streams. Camera cuts to a side profile—only inches between her and the crushing water. Time resumes at full speed. Floating reefs pulse like heartbeats, airborne fish schools shift like galaxies, distant sky currents ripple like breathing oceans. Golden sunlight pierces through layers of suspended water, refracting into moving beams that dance across every surface. The whale arcs upward, breaching through the sky-ceiling into open air. In the final moment, the whale looks back—the light-core at its head pulses once, like a farewell—then releases a radiant ring of light that ripples outward across the entire floating ocean. Camera pulls back rapidly, the silhouettes of whale and surfer consumed by light. Frame freezes at the farthest edge of the expanding light wave. Rules: New composition every single second. Must include: surfer eye extreme close-up, feet-on-crystal-board close-up, whale light-pupil extreme close-up, suspended water droplet close-up. Music is ethereal electronic pulses synchronized to visuals. No humans clipping. No text or watermark. Let AI freely interpret light refraction and droplet trajectories.

prompts.text: A fast-paced, highly cinematic live-action commercial shot in a modern metropolis at dawn. 0-3s (City Awakening): Wide drone shot over a glowing modern city skyline at sunrise. Rapid, smooth zoom down to street level, focusing on a realistic young woman (blonde hair, light eyes, athletic pink top) tying her sneaker on a concrete step. 3-6s (Lace Up & Logo Reveal): Extreme close-up. She pulls the laces tight swiftly. The camera tracks smoothly along the side of the sleek running shoe, revealing a premium, reflective metal "el.cine" logo embedded into the mesh. 6-9s (Kinetic Sprint): Tracking shot from a moving vehicle. She sprints powerfully down the empty city street. The camera stays low, focusing on the dynamic impact of the futuristic sneakers on the pavement, with subtle glowing orange energy dispersing with every step. 9-12s (Drone Helix Spin): As she leaps over a puddle, an FPV drone camera executes a rapid, 360-degree helix spin around her in mid-air. The scene slows into brief bullet-time, perfectly highlighting her focused expression and the shoes. 12-15s (End Graphic): She lands smoothly and continues running out of frame. The camera stops abruptly, and crisp white text seamlessly appears in the center of the screen: "designed by el.cine".

3-6s (Lace Up & Logo Reveal): Extreme close-up. She pulls the laces tight swiftly. The camera tracks smoothly along the side of the sleek running shoe, revealing a premium, reflective metal "el.cine" logo embedded into the mesh.

6-9s (Kinetic Sprint): Tracking shot from a moving vehicle. She sprints powerfully down the empty city street. The camera stays low, focusing on the dynamic impact of the futuristic sneakers on the pavement, with subtle glowing orange energy dispersing with every step.

9-12s (Drone Helix Spin): As she leaps over a puddle, an FPV drone camera executes a rapid, 360-degree helix spin around her in mid-air. The scene slows into brief bullet-time, perfectly highlighting her focused expression and the shoes.

12-15s (End Graphic): She lands smoothly and continues running out of frame. The camera stops abruptly, and crisp white text seamlessly appears in the center of the screen: "designed by el.cine".

prompts.text: 🚨PromptShare🚨 First-person POV of a motorcycle rider shot prompt for Seedance 2 PROMPT Character First-person POV of a motorcycle rider, hands gripping handlebars tightly, subtle body movement reacting to terrain, full focus and tension. POV shot accelerating on a razor-thin dirt path carved into a cliff. Massive drop visible on both sides. Wind rushing loudly. Camera slightly unstable, subtle head movement. Path narrows even more. Left side—endless void. Right side—vertical rock wall inches away. Bike leans sharply to avoid scraping. Sudden uneven terrain. Front dips slightly. Hands tighten on handlebars. Small rocks fall off the edge into the abyss. Sharp turn ahead. Rider brakes slightly, then leans aggressively. Camera tilts with the movement—extreme vertigo effect. Close to the edge. One wheel nearly slips. Tiny correction saves balance at the last second. Acceleration again. Path becomes unstable, crumbling edges. Dust and debris falling into the void. Final straight. Full speed. Camera slightly tilts downward revealing the immense depth below. Wind intensifies. End on forward rush. Camera True first-person POV, micro head movements, subtle shake, tilt synced with bike lean, immersive tracking Narrow cliffside path, deep abyss on both sides, rocky textures, falling debris, high altitude environment Ultra realistic, extreme vertigo sensation, cinematic immersion, natural lighting, strong depth perception, fluid motion, no distortion, no stretching

prompts.text: [PR] yachimatさんのプロンプトを参考にして、架空アニメのOPをつくりました。 他の2種のPromptはリプ欄に💌 Seedance 2.0 プロンプト👇 15-second ultra-vibrant anime cinematic sequence, perfect anime 2D cel-shaded style, continuous single-take camera flythrough with rapid lateral drifts and rollercoaster momentum, high motion coherence, 24FPS feel with generous animation frames. REFERENCE: - Use [アット]mage1 as EXACT character lock for IDOL GIRL: young woman, long straight black hair with blunt bangs, large psychedelic spiral eyes (concentric rainbow rings), iridescent pale skin with holographic sheen, black sleeveless top with white pointed collar featuring embroidered psychedelic flower brooch and ribbon tie, long green A-line skirt covered in swirling paisley and floral pattern (pink, orange, yellow, green), iridescent lavender platform Mary Jane shoes, small pink stud earring on right ear. - Use [アット] as EXACT character lock for NYAN: round chubby orange tabby cat, large golden-olive eyes with cross-shaped sigil pupils, pink nose, orange fur with bold black stripe patches, cream-white belly, orange-and-black striped tail, small golden tags on body, short stubby legs, soft round silhouette. - Use [アット] as EXACT character lock for FUSINYAN: sitting pastel cat, soft lavender-white fur with pink and mint-green watercolor patches, heterochromatic op-art eyes (left eye red concentric target, right eye blue concentric spiral), red nose, black bands on lower back with rainbow stripe inlays, pink-and-mint striped tail with black tip, round plush body, small eye-like symbols on sides. AUDIO: upbeat J-pop instrumental, bright synth chords, bouncy bass line, sparkling chime accents. No voice, no dialogue. [0.0–3.0s] FAST FORWARD DOLLY through an infinite pastel sky filled with drifting candy-colored confetti, holographic bubbles, and spinning star particles — camera rockets forward at high speed, slight barrel-roll rotation, streaks of pink and mint light whipping past the lens. Foreground wipes: giant pastel lollipops, ribbons, and cat-paw-shaped sparkles fly past camera. [3.0–6.0s] Camera sweeps right and PUSHES IN on IDOL GIRL sitting cross-legged on a giant floating macaroon throne, chin resting on one hand, psychedelic eyes glowing with slow spiral rotation. She notices camera — eyes widen, she breaks into a bright smile and tosses a handful of glitter directly at the lens. Confetti explosion fills the frame. CAMERA: medium shot → extreme close-up on spiral eyes during smile. [6.0–9.0s] Camera WHIP-PANS left and ARCS AROUND NYAN mid-leap — all four paws spread wide, mouth open in a big cheerful meow, golden eyes sparkling. Tiny holographic fish swirl around him. Camera completes a 180-degree arc as NYAN does a spinning somersault, tail curling into a heart shape at the apex. Speed lines and star bursts radiate from his body. CAMERA: low-angle tracking arc, dynamic motion blur on the spin. [9.0–12.0s] Camera DRIFTS LATERALLY and finds FUSINYAN sitting perfectly still on a floating crystal ball, one paw raised to her mouth in a "shh" gesture, heterochromatic eyes pulsing — left eye's red target ripples outward, right eye's blue spiral slowly rotates. Psychedelic energy rings radiate gently from her body in pastel rainbow waves. Camera DOLLIES IN SLOWLY — mysterious, calm contrast to the previous energy. CAMERA: medium shot → medium close-up, gentle dolly-in. [12.0–15.0s] Camera PULLS BACK into an EXTREME LONG SHOT — all three characters arranged in a triangle formation floating in the pastel void. IDOL GIRL standing center-back with arms spread wide, NYAN bouncing on her right shoulder, FUSINYAN perched regally on her left shoulder. Massive burst of rainbow confetti and holographic light rays explode behind them. Camera holds the final tableau with a subtle slow push-in. CAMERA: extreme long shot with slow dolly-in to full shot. Infinite pastel sky environment, maximum emphasis on character personality and joyful energy, perfect face/body consistency from references, bright candy-colored anime lighting with soft rim lights and sparkling highlights, no dark shadows, no weapons, no blood, no realistic textures, 1080p quality. 今回のPromptは、タイムテーブル型を採用しました。 めっちゃ素敵なアニメのOPになった😍 yachimatさん ありがとうございます。

prompts.author: @aditiitwt
prompts.text: 15-second cinematic Japanese drama pure love ambiguous short film, ultra-realistic photorealistic quality. Afternoon empty classroom bathed in warm golden sunlight streaming through Venetian blinds onto rows of old wooden desks. Delicate dust particles drift slowly in the light beams. Extremely natural micro-movements, breathing, and eye contact tension. Characters maintain perfect facial consistency, clothing, and hairstyle throughout no deformation, no drifting, no artifacts. Subtle realistic chest rises and falls synchronized with breathing. Shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh background, warm film grain, razor-sharp 8K. Japanese youth-style restrained, heart-fluttering, almost suffocating romantic atmosphere.0-4 seconds: Extremely slow push-in shot from medium desk view to side-profile close-up of the two students sitting side by side. Pure and innocent girl in summer school uniform, head slightly lowered as she focuses on writing notes. Long black hair with soft strands gently lifted by a breeze near her ear. Long eyelashes casting delicate shadows. Naturally flushed, soft skin. Corners of her mouth unconsciously curve upward in quiet concentration. Light, even breathing.4-9 seconds: Cut to the boy in close-up. School uniform collar slightly loosened, elbow on the desk, secretly turning his head to gaze at her. Eyes full of gentle, restrained affection and tenderness. Pupils slightly dilated. Adam’s apple bobs softly. Suddenly noticing her pen pause, he panics and quickly turns back to pretend to look at his own notes. Ear tips flush with a faint red. Fingertips tremble slightly as he grips the pen. Occasionally steals a glance at her from under his bangs. Breathing becomes slightly unsteady, lips pressed tightly as he tries to stay calm.9-15 seconds: Extreme dual close-up of both faces in the same frame, slow-motion. Their eyes suddenly meet. The girl slowly turns her head, first with a hazy, surprised expression, then quickly lowers her gaze in embarrassment for 0.3 seconds, gently biting her lower lip. Cheeks and earlobes instantly bloom with cherry-blossom pink. Moist eyelashes timidly lift as she looks back at him. At the same time, she shyly whispers in a soft voice, “......What are you looking at?” The boy freezes completely, pupils dilating, stunned for 0.4 seconds, then stammers in a flustered whisper, “N... nothing.” The girl bites her lip again, steals another glance at him, and whispers even softer, “......You’re lying.” The boy pauses, then lets out a gentle sigh and replies tenderly, “......Just looking at you.” His mouth slowly curves into a shy, gentle, lopsided smile. Fine smile lines appear at the corners of his eyes. Breathing noticeably deeper. prompts.author: @Ousslabs
prompts.text: [0:00–0:02] — Establishing shot: Wide cinematic shot from low angle, a matte black sports car accelerates out of a tunnel into a rain-slicked neon-lit city street at night. Headlights cut through dense fog. Wet asphalt reflects red and cyan neon signs. Camera locked off with subtle lens flare. Sound: deep engine roar building from silence, tires screaming on wet road. [0:02–0:05] — Action close-up: Extreme close-up of the driver's gloved hands gripping the steering wheel, intense eyes in the rearview mirror. Quick rack focus from hands to dashboard gauges climbing into the red zone. Handheld camera with slight tremor, 50mm normal lens. Lighting: hard chiaroscuro from instrument cluster glow, deep shadows on face. Sound: turbo whine, heartbeat sfx rising in mix. [0:05–0:08] — Slow motion hero moment: Ultra slow motion (0.2x speed), the car drifts sideways through a neon-soaked intersection. Water particles suspended in air, tire smoke trails in slow arcs. Camera: low side-angle dolly tracking shot, 24mm wide lens. Lighting transitions from cool blue to warm amber golden as street lights blur into bokeh streaks. Color grade: teal and orange high-contrast film look. Sound: engine pitch drops into deep slow-motion rumble, cinematic bass hit sfx. [0:08–0:10] — Climax aerial pull-back: Rapid cut to overhead drone-style pull-back shot, the car disappears into a tunnel of city lights. Final frame holds on neon reflections on wet pavement. Lighting: cool blue twilight, volumetric light shafts from streetlamps through fog. Camera: steady dolly out with slight upward tilt. Sound: cinematic whoosh + reverb tail fade to silence. Style: 35mm film grain, Kodak Vision3 color palette, anamorphic lens flare. Cinematic 2.39:1 aspect ratio. No camera shake during slow motion segment. Hyper-realistic physics, photoreal rendering.

prompts.author: @EHuanglu
prompts.text: An adrenaline-filled, fast-moving live-action commercial with energetic parkour movements. 0-3s (The Drop): A sudden, fast-falling perspective shot looking down the side of a concrete staircase. The blonde woman vaults over the railing, dropping gracefully into the frame. 3-6s (Impact & Branding): Low-angle close-up. Her sneakers hit the ground with immense power. The camera executes a fast snap-pan to the side of the shoe, clearly showing a rugged, embossed "el.cine" logo on the heel. 6-9s (Continuous Flow): A continuous, fast-paced tracking shot runs alongside her as she swiftly navigates urban obstacles—leaping over benches and sliding under barriers. The camera captures the fluid, realistic motion of her body and the flexibility of the footwear. 9-12s (The Vault): She performs a powerful vault toward the camera. Time slows down dramatically mid-vault. The camera orbits 180 degrees, keeping the intricate design of the bottom sole and the side logo in center focus against the bright blue sky. 12-15s (End Graphic): Real-time resumes as she lands cleanly. A quick whip-pan transitions the scene into a solid background where the bold text appears: "designed by el.cine"

prompts.author: @madgreek65
prompts.text: FORMAT: 15s / 145 BPM / 6 SHOTS / Suspense routine SUBJECT: @image_1 WARDROBE: Prehistoric caveman clothes ENVIRONMENT: A magical time portal in prehistoric wasteland MOOD: Intense suspense and sudden action MUSIC: Suspenseful, magical Jurassic sounds COLOR LOGIC: Brown desolate wasteland colors with magical dusty colors STYLE: Ultra-Realistic. LOGIC RULE: Keep logical consistency in wardrobe, props, locations, and action continuity across all shots. SHOT 1: ECU, 85mm push-in / 06:50 Lightning strikes in the distance, magical colors sparkle on and around the portal, SHOT 2: WS, 35mm handheld jolt / Rhythmic cut to a caveman running towards the portal. He is looking over his shoulder as a Mammoth running towards him gets closer SHOT 3: MCU, 50mm slide / Cut portal view as the caveman walks through the magic portal and disappears in a wave of colors within the portal. SHOT 4: Insert shot, 85mm rack focus / Match cut to a point of view from behind the mammoth who sees the caveman vanish in the portal SHOT 5: drone side view of the mammoth looking at the portal, 24mm wide / the mammoth walks up to the portal and sniffs it SHOT 6: Insert shot, 50mm handheld / the mammoth runs through the portal and vanishes "

prompts.tweet_text:
I did something similar to this with this same image many months ago. It was very hard and took so much effort. This is first try with a single prompt using #Seedance2  Prompt "Prompt: FORMAT: 15s / 145 BPM / 6 SHOTS / Suspense  routine

SUBJECT: @image_1

WARDROBE: Prehistoric caveman clothes

ENVIRONMENT: A magical time portal in prehistoric wasteland

MOOD: Intense suspense and sudden action

MUSIC: Suspenseful, magical Jurassic sounds

COLOR LOGIC: Brown desolate wasteland colors with magical dusty colors

STYLE: Ultra-Realistic.

LOGIC RULE: Keep logical consistency in wardrobe, props, locations, and action continuity across all shots.

SHOT 1: ECU, 85mm push-in / 06:50 Lightning strikes in the distance, magical colors sparkle on and around the portal,

SHOT 2: WS, 35mm handheld jolt / Rhythmic cut to a caveman running towards the portal. He is looking over his shoulder as a Mammoth running towards him gets closer

SHOT 3: MCU, 50mm slide / Cut portal view as the caveman walks through the magic portal and disappears in a wave of colors within the portal.

SHOT 4: Insert shot, 85mm rack focus / Match cut to a point of view from behind the mammoth who sees the caveman vanish in the portal

SHOT 5: drone side view of the mammoth looking at the portal, 24mm wide / the mammoth walks up to the portal and sniffs it

SHOT 6: Insert shot, 50mm handheld / the mammoth runs through the portal and vanishes "

prompts.author: @KabookiAI
prompts.text: 15-second text-to-video continuous single-take sequence. Raw 70s/80s grindhouse horror style. Heavy analog film grain, high contrast, photorealistic practical effects. Heavy speed ramps. NO CUTS. [SUBJECT DESCRIPTIONS] - HEROINE: Ultimate 80s grindhouse final girl, striking athletic early 20s. Wet messy hair, fierce determined expression. Wearing a dark high-cut 80s athletic one-piece swimsuit. Alluring yet lethal. - THE MONSTER: Slimy aquatic beast with dark scales, jagged teeth, milky dead eyes, muscular and visceral. [TIMELINE SCRIPT] 0–3s: [THE DEEP END] Action: She treads water frantically as a massive slimy silhouette rises fast from the pool drain. Camera: Underwater low-angle looking up at her floating silhouette with distorted neon surface light. Audio: Muffled bass, panicked breathing, distant synthwave. 3–6s: [THE AMBUSH] Action: Beast lunges upward. She contorts backward in extreme slow-motion as its jaws snap inches from her face. Camera: Fast underwater orbit locking into tight profile. Audio: Violent water rush dropping to heavy sub-bass hum. 6–9s: [THE GRAPPLE] Action: Beast grabs her thigh. She twists and drives her heel brutally into its snout. Camera: Shaky handheld underwater medium shot. Audio: Thudding impacts, monstrous screech, frantic thrashing. 9–12s: [THE DRAW] Action: She propels backward and draws a serrated dive knife from her calf in elegant slow-motion. Camera: Slight dolly-back into heroic tense framing. Audio: Echoing metallic *schwing* + rising 80s horror synth swell. 12–15s: [THE STRIKE] Action: Beast charges. She lunges forward and drives the knife deep into its skull as they sink into darkness. Camera: Slow tilt-down watching them plunge into the deep end. Audio: Brutal muffled puncture thud fading into crushing underwater silence. [CONSTRAINTS] Single unbroken take. Strictly photorealistic 80s grindhouse look. Accurate underwater physics, light refraction, and bubble dynamics.

prompts.author: @Dheepanratnam
prompts.text: Video prompt seedance 2.0 - 15s text to video The Storm Shepherd vs the Glass Locust King A cinematic weather war. A nomadic shepherd in layered sky-blue robes stands on a high desert ridge during a sandstorm. He fights using a hooked crook, wind channels, and charged storm clouds. His enemy is a king locust made of translucent chitin, lightning veins, and a swarm-crown of crystal insects. The setting transitions from dune ridge → storm trench → lightning plateau → salt crater. 0–3 seconds: the locust king descends out of the storm with a shrieking crown of glass-winged insects. The shepherd drives his crook into the sand and pulls a vortex of wind upward, forcing the first wave of insects into a spiraling wall. Close-ups of cracked lips, cloth snapping, glass wings, and charged dust. 3–7 seconds: the locust king splinters into swarming formations that attack from every direction across a trench carved by wind. The shepherd walks into the storm, redirecting gusts with broad arm sweeps. Each movement creates visible wind corridors that slam the swarm into rock spires. Sand peels off the ground in ribbons. Close-ups of sandals sliding, storm static along the crook, chitin fractures, and lightning flicker under skin. 7–10 seconds: the battle climbs onto a lightning plateau. The locust king towers above him with a giant fan of translucent wings reflecting the whole storm. The shepherd raises both hands and pulls a fork of lightning out of the sky like a rope, then whips it in a massive arc that shears off half the swarm crown. Orbit camera, desert lightning, flying crystal limbs. 10–12 seconds: rapid tracking shot as the shepherd runs across a collapsing salt shelf while the king reforms and dives with all wings screaming. He hooks the crook into its thorax and drags it downward into a charged crater. 12–15 seconds: overhead slow fall into the salt crater as storm winds spiral inward. The shepherd lands first while the locust king breaks apart into rain, glass fragments, and dead static that spiderwebs through the salt. Final frame: one intact locust wing ringing in the wind. Style: epic storm fantasy, desert electricity, glass insect textures, sand and lightning choreography, high-contrast sky warfare.

The shepherd walks into the storm, redirecting gusts with broad arm sweeps. Each movement creates visible wind corridors that slam the swarm into rock spires. Sand peels off the ground in ribbons. Close-ups of sandals sliding, storm static along the crook, chitin fractures, and lightning flicker under skin. 7–10 seconds: the battle climbs onto a lightning plateau. The locust king towers above him with a giant fan of translucent wings reflecting the whole storm. The shepherd raises both hands and pulls a fork of lightning out of the sky like a rope, then whips it in a massive arc that shears off half the swarm crown. Orbit camera, desert lightning, flying crystal limbs. 10–12 seconds: rapid tracking shot as the shepherd runs across a collapsing salt shelf while the king reforms and dives with all wings screaming. He hooks the crook into its thorax and drags it downward into a charged crater. 12–15 seconds: overhead slow fall into the salt crater as storm winds spiral inward. The shepherd lands first while the locust king breaks apart into rain, glass fragments, and dead static that spiderwebs through the salt. Final frame: one intact locust wing ringing in the wind. Style: epic storm fantasy, desert electricity, glass insect textures, sand and lightning choreography, high-contrast sky warfare.

prompts.text: Blood Moon Approaches Eclipse Moon Vampire Princess Ultra-cool transformation transition effect, recreating popular short videos Seedance 2.0 All-in-One Reference Prompt Shot One: Everyday Home Scene Time Segment: 0:00 to 0:02 Shot Distance and Type: Medium shot, handheld follow-cam Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera subtly sways with the character's movements, with a light, upbeat, and lively rhythm. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The girl is wearing white loungewear pajamas patterned with Crayon Shin-chan designs and a bear hairband. She holds a sheet of white paper rolled into the shape of a telescope. She first playfully waves this "paper telescope" with a smile on her face, then directly aims one end of the "paper telescope" at and fully presses it against the lens, using the physical darkness inside the paper tube to block the frame, creating a perfect transition medium. Visual Effects: No obvious effects, belonging to everyday real-light-and-shadow recording. Cleverly utilizes the dark circular hole inside the paper tube rolled into a telescope shape as a physical transition entry medium. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Warm white tones, bright. Mood is relaxed, everyday, and lively, laying the groundwork for the dramatic contrast to follow. Shot Two: Spacetime Tunnel Transition Time Segment: 0:02 to 0:04 Shot Distance and Type: Close-up transitioning to full wide shot, first-person perspective push-in Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera rapidly pushes forward at high speed, visually as if directly penetrating the inner hole of the "paper telescope" the girl pressed against the lens in the previous second, delivering an extremely strong visual impact and a sense of extreme speed. Main Subject Actions and Expression: No character subject, primarily showcasing the process of traversing space. Visual Effects: Intense CG visual effects, deep red vortex and wormhole effects with a strong sense of suction and spatial distortion, followed by bats flying out from the depths of the frame as visual guides. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Interwoven dark red and black. Mood shifts instantly from relaxed to mysterious, dangerous, and filled with a sense of the unknown. Shot Three: Vampire Princess Descends Time Segment: 0:04 to 0:06 Shot Distance and Type: Overhead full wide shot transitioning to medium shot, panning camera (downward pan) Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera pans from top to bottom, aligning with the character's upward gaze, with speed transitioning from fast to slow motion, creating tremendous visual tension. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The transformed vampire princess (white hair, elven ears, white ornate gown, red nails) gazes up at the lens from below, extending one hand toward the lens as if inviting or casting a spell, her expression alluring yet brimming with dangerous allure. Visual Effects: Strong slow-motion (high-frame-rate) treatment, with a large amount of red petals or light-spot particles drifting in the foreground, a red magical halo floating above the character's head, and a background of intersecting black Gothic tree branches and net-like structures. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Intense dark red blended with high-contrast cool white tones. Mood is mysterious, seductive, and infused with Gothic opulence. Shot Four: Alluring Freeze-Frame Time Segment: 0:06 to 0:09 Shot Distance and Type: Medium close-up, with a slight handheld push-pull feel Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera remains relatively fixed but with a breathing and subtle tremor sensation, syncing with the music's beat for a strong rhythmic pulse. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The character holds the extended-hand pose, lightly touching her lips with the other hand, her gaze locked directly on the lens, her expression radiating immense allure and oppressive intensity. Visual Effects: Incorporates frame-skipping, rapid flickers, subtle screen distortion (glitch-fault style), and radial blur effects, paired with high-frequency red light flashes to amplify visual impact and cyberpunk vibes. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Large areas of high-saturation red background, with the character at the absolute visual center. Mood is high-energy, intensely visually aggressive. Shot Five: Blood Moon Flight Time Segment: 0:09 to 0:12 Shot Distance and Type: Long shot, fixed camera Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera remains steady, with elements in the frame exhibiting a slow floating sensation. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The character unfurls massive demonic wings, hovering in the night sky in an expansive pose. Visual Effects: Grand scene compositing, with a massive blood moon in the background, rendered with dark red cloud layers; slow-motion flocks of bats accompany in flight, evoking a powerful epic atmosphere. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Dark fantasy tones dominated by black and red. Mood is grand, awe-inspiring, and brimming with dominance, perfectly echoing the video's theme.

prompts.author: @ShadeLurk
prompts.text: Shot 2-1 (0s–5s) Medium shot, slow dolly in. A morning market in the fused city. Glowing plants grown by elves with magic stand alongside Earth's vegetables and fruits, and mithril trinkets forged by dwarves are arranged in wooden crates. An elf merchant with pointed ears exchanges goods with a smiling Earth human. A beastkin girl with animal ears and a tail curiously picks up an Earth fruit. Soft morning natural light, warm color temperature, cinematic, shallow depth of field. Narration (low, resonant male Japanese voice): "Elves brought magic, and dwarves brought technology." White Japanese subtitles at the bottom of the screen: "Elves brought magic, and dwarves brought technology." Shot 2-2 (5s–10s) Medium shot, slow horizontal pan. A street in the fused city. At the terrace seating of an Earth café, an elf woman shows a scroll inscribed with runes to an Earth student. In the background, a dwarf craftsman assembles a spirit-powered device alongside an Earth engineer. Street signs feature both Japanese and elvish script. Warm afternoon light, golden hour, warm color temperature, cinematic, film grain. Narration (low, resonant male Japanese voice): "Beastkin brought keen senses, and dwarves brought engineering. Each contribution reshaped everyday life." White Japanese subtitles at the bottom of the screen: "Beastkin brought keen senses, and dwarves brought engineering. Each contribution reshaped everyday life." Shot 2-3 (10s–15s) Wide shot, slow tilt up. A panoramic view of the fused city at dusk. Elven vines and dwarven gear decorations beautifully entwine the framework of Tokyo Tower, forming a magnificent hybrid structure. At the base in the plaza, Earth humans and elves run stalls together; in the sky, silhouettes of angel-like wings gracefully circle, while beastkin children race around with Earth children. Lighting blending sunset oranges with the pale blue glow of elven magic, a grand sense of scale, cinematic 4K, film grain. Narration (low, resonant male Japanese voice): "Where magic and science intertwine—a new world begins to turn." White Japanese subtitles at the bottom of the screen: "Where magic and science intertwine—a new world begins to turn."

prompts.text: The host! Prompt on Seedance 2 : A lone explorer with a headlamp enters a vast arctic ice cave, crystalline blue walls glittering in the narrow beam of light. Slow push-in follows through the cave entrance, each step crunching on frost, breath visible in the freezing air, the headlamp illuminating intricate ice formations that stretch into darkness. A deep rumble shakes loose ice from the ceiling. The camera shifts to urgent shaky handheld, swinging wildly as the explorer spins around, the headlamp catching glimpses of something massive moving in the shadows, sickly pale green bioluminescent veins pulsing along the cave walls. The perspective snaps to a wide static shot as the creature emerges fully, a towering insectoid horror covered in translucent ice-like chitin, green light pulsing from within its body, dwarfing the terrified explorer. Glacial blue ice environment, bioluminescent creature design, horror lighting. 16:9 cinematic.

prompts.text: PromptShare Cinematic Battle prompt for Seedance 2 made in @invideoOfficial PROMPT Character A highly trained female operative in a sleek black tactical suit, calm, focused, controlled breathing, sharp eyes scanning constantly. Dual pistols in hand, precise and efficient. 0-3s Camera starts inside a luxury bank. Slow push through a tense standoff—security guards aiming, civilians frozen. She stands in the center, perfectly still. 3-5s Without warning—everything explodes into motion. She steps forward. Rapid precise shots—each movement minimal, controlled, no wasted motion. 5-7s Camera locks close to her, orbiting as she moves through guards. She uses environment—pillars, desks—flowing movement, never stopping. 7-9s Transition through glass reflections. She slides across polished floor, firing mid-motion, bullets impacting surfaces around her. 9-11s Tight corridor sequence. Close-quarters engagement, ultra fast reactions, micro head turns, instant targeting. 11-13s Massive push forward into main hall. Camera pulls wide—chaos everywhere. She moves through it like it’s slowed down. 13-15s Final moment. She exits through shattered glass doors into daylight. Doesn’t look back. Behind her—delayed impacts, everything collapses. Camera freezes on her walking away. Continuous tracking shot, tight proximity + dynamic orbit + whip transitions masked by movement Luxury bank interior, marble, glass, reflections, daylight contrast Ultra realistic, hollywood heist action, john wick gun-fu, precise choreography, high tension, fluid motion, cinematic lighting, no distortion, no stretching

prompts.text: An absolutely epic battle !!! Seedance 2.0 prompt Ultra-realistic cinematic disaster epic, single continuous shot, no cuts, no montage, no multiple-camera language, documentary-style realism, IMAX-scale clarity, natural film grain, high dynamic range, physically accurate daylight, realistic atmospheric perspective, authentic reflections, volumetric dust and smoke, true-to-life city lighting and environmental behavior. A real modern Chinese megacity in daytime: high-rise towers, elevated roads, broad avenues, plaza spaces, parked and moving cars, street signs, glass facades, all with the look of genuine live-action footage. The shot begins with chaos already underway: a colossal ancient giant python, far larger and more terrifying than a realistic anaconda, is violently rampaging through the city. Its thick muscular body whips between streets and buildings with horrifying speed and weight, crushing cars, smashing roadside structures, wrapping around building facades, lunging at fleeing crowds. People run in panic, vehicles collide, glass shards, concrete dust, torn billboards and debris fill the air. Everything feels like a real catastrophic emergency captured in one uninterrupted shot. Then the sky suddenly shifts. Clouds are torn apart at high speed and a gigantic Chinese dragon dives down from the heavens. This is not a cartoon dragon and has no wings. It is a believable colossal Eastern dragon, a mysterious real biological creature of the natural world, long serpentine body, no wings, powerful limbs, realistic muscles, bones, scale overlap, weathered reflective scales, layered shadows, natural skin tension, believable mass and inertia. As it moves, its body undulates through the air with convincing aerodynamic resistance, whiskers and mane trailing in turbulent airflow, subtle cloud vapor and disturbed mist forming around it. The dragon descends like a guardian over the city, precisely targeting the giant python below. In one continuous shot, the two beasts engage in a brutal close-range fight among skyscrapers and over shattered streets. The python coils, strikes, and thrashes between buildings; the Chinese dragon tears away constriction with its claws, coils around the serpent to overpower it, and finally bites hard into the python's upper body and neck. With overwhelming force, the dragon drags the struggling serpent up from the city ruins and lifts it into the sky. In the final moments, the wingless Chinese dragon powers upward by driving its long body through the air, carrying the still-writhing python away into the distant sky. Below, terrified citizens stop running and stare upward in stunned awe. The ruined city remains filled with smoke, debris, and sunlight cutting through haze, creating a final epic image of a divine dragon saving humanity. Keep the entire piece grounded in real-world physics, realistic destruction, believable scale, terrifying weight, restrained camera behavior, immersive live-action disaster authenticity, not stylized, not fantasy-cartoon, not game-like, absolutely photorealistic.
