prompts.text: Made on seedance 2.0 on @LumeflowAI "Each frame can change clothing and visual style independently. Do not maintain outfit or style continuity. Ultra-realistic cinematic video, 15s, 24fps. Powered by SEEDANCE 2. A 22–25-year-old Korean female dancer (clear skin, soft facial features, defined jawline, expressive eyes) performs hip-hop choreography, including a smooth moonwalk. Her body movement remains fluid, precise, and continuous throughout. CAMERA: Dynamic handheld energy camera swings, slight shake, crash zoom in/out, fast push-ins, and rhythmic orbits around the dancer, tightly following her movement flow. CORE ACTION: She dances confidently, centered in frame, full-body visible, strong rhythm, sharp footwork, expressive upper-body control, clean transitions. CHAOS TRANSFORMATION (VERY HIGH SPEED): Clothing AND visual style change extremely fast (near every frame flicker). CLOTHING: Every frame = new trendy outfit (no repetition, no blending): - modern Korean streetwear (oversized fits, cargos, crop jackets) - layered urban Seoul fashion - edgy K-pop performance outfits - contemporary dancewear with bold silhouettes - high-fashion minimalist Korean styling STYLE TRANSFORMATION (identity preserved): Rapidly shift between unique visual styles: - realistic human rendering - anime-style rendering (K-style aesthetic) - minimal continuous line art - watercolor wash illustration - inked comic style (bold outlines, graphic shading) - soft pastel illustration - textured digital painting - rough sketch drawing style - marker illustration style - paper cut-out collage style - clay-like sculpted look - low-poly geometric 3D - neon outline silhouette style - glitch-outline graphic style (clean, non-distorting) - storybook illustration style - hand-painted brush style - chalkboard drawing style - airbrush gradient illustration - silhouette shadow art style STYLE BLENDING BURSTS: Occasionally combine 2–3 styles in a single frame (e.g., line art + watercolor, comic + low-poly, sketch + digital paint) for brief visual bursts. CRITICAL: Her facial features, proportions, and identity must remain consistent across all styles. Only rendering style and clothing change — NOT the person. SYNC: Style and outfit changes align tightly with dance rhythm, beat hits, and camera motion. VISUAL FEEL: Hyper-fast flicker, energetic, sharp, clean readability, high-end K-pop visual energy. LIGHTING: Dynamic studio lighting adapting instantly to style changes — neon, soft diffused, high-contrast, stage lighting shifts. CONSTRAINTS: - body motion must remain perfectly continuous - no pose resets - no face distortion or identity change - only clothing and visual style change rapidly - no text, no logos inspired by @madpencil_

prompts.tweet_text:
The prompt does the heavy lifting. Mine had three sections:

1. Scene setup (chef, kitchen, lighting)
2. Action beats (crack egg, oil snaps, close-up of yolk)
3. Audio cues (sizzle, soft jazz, dialogue "service up")

Seedance reads action beats as cuts. That is how you get multi-shot in one pass.

prompts.author: @Kiber_Alla
prompts.text: Seedance V2 It is really fun to do long videos but you need to do some editing to get the best out of the clips, I did not do any editing with this video. This is the firs Clip prompt Shoot this like a prestige streaming thriller, not a music video, not fantasy. Two women, both idols, both adults. The scene lives in breath, silence, and proximity. Set the entire moment in a dim vintage apartment hallway, or the corner of an old room that feels half-forgotten. Deep walnut wood paneling. Antique brass wall sconces. One warm amber pool of light falls over the women while everything beyond it dies into shadow. The space should feel beautiful, expensive, and airless, as if the room itself is closing around them. Character one is Han Seo-rin, early 30s, a Korean female idol with an elegant but quietly dangerous presence. She wears a black turtleneck under a long black coat, all clean lines and dark restraint. Her hair is sleek, dark, and softly layered around the face, with a slight fringe that lets her eyes appear and disappear in the low light. She is not loud. She is the kind of woman who controls a room by lowering her voice. Character two is Tachibana Rei, 25, a Japanese female idol with a pale, fragile beauty that reads delicate at first glance but emotionally intelligent on closer look. She wears an ivory V-neck knit dress that falls to the knees, soft and understated, the fabric catching the warm light. Her long dark hair is slightly disordered, as though the evening has already worn her down. She looks like someone trying very hard not to show fear. The emotional shape is simple: suspicion, pressure, fixation. No overt violence. No grabbing. No melodrama. The tension comes from how little space Seo-rin leaves Rei to breathe. Open on Rei already standing near the wall beneath the sconce, shoulders tight, breathing shallow, gaze lowered but restless. Then let Seo-rin enter behind her, close enough to dominate the frame without touching. She stops just at Rei’s back, almost still, letting the silence do the work. The camera should feel like it is slowly being pulled toward them. Seo-rin leans in toward Rei’s ear, speaking so softly that it feels more dangerous than a shout. One hand rises near Rei’s cheek, almost brushing it, but never quite landing. Keep that hesitation. That is where the charge is. Rei’s hands tense near her chest. Her fingers curl. Her jaw tightens. She looks away, then toward the doorway, then down again, realizing there is nowhere easy to go. Use close shots of the details that matter: the tremor in Rei’s fingers, the flicker in her eyes, the shadow of Seo-rin’s face falling across her neck, the black silhouette of the coat swallowing the warm light, the tiny pause before a breath, the way Rei tries to stay composed and fails by a fraction. Dialogue should feel intimate, dangerous, and controlled. Seo-rin, near Rei’s ear, almost gentle: “You can run from everyone else. Not from me.” Seo-rin, after the smallest pause: “Stay where I can see you.” Rei, voice unsteady, trying to hold herself together: “Please... just let me leave.” Seo-rin, with the faintest smile, certain of the answer before she speaks: “You already know this is where the story ends.” Performance note: Seo-rin is never frantic, never theatrical, never raising her voice. Her control is what makes her frightening. Rei is not weak, just cornered; she should feel intelligent, proud, and increasingly shaken, fighting to keep her dignity in a moment that is slipping out of her hands. Visual tone: premium psychological thriller, shallow depth of field, slow deliberate camera drift, warm practical light against surrounding darkness, realistic skin texture, subtle fabric movement, no camp, no exaggerated acting. The scene should feel like a forbidden, dangerous beat from an expensive late-night TV drama.

prompts.author: @ZaraIrahh
prompts.text: FPV drone camera chasing a pack of 2 racing cars speeding together on a super narrow curvy road in a ruined apocalyptic city. The cars are racing and chasing each other aggressively, drifting through sharp turns, overtaking, bumping slightly, and competing for position. The FPV camera flies low behind them, swinging left and right, diving and rising with the steep up-down road. Dust clouds explode from the tires. Broken buildings, flying surveillance drones emitting scanning waves, and rays of light cutting through dusty air. Minimalistic color palette, cinematic lighting, hyper-detailed environment, ultra-realistic, high-speed motion blur, intense chaotic racing energy.

prompts.author: @drjoetw
prompts.text: cat master deserves a nice break (made with Seedance 2.0 on @nemovideoai ) Prompt share DAY STRUCTURE: 15s / 148 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 3D slapstick wuxia-animal comedy TONE: disciplined temple routine collapsing into chaotic micro-mayhem SUBJECT: Orange cat monk in worn grey dao robe, agile but constantly sleep-deprived CAST: Black-robed chanting cat monks (low-energy), White training monks (overconfident), Elder red-robed master cat (silent authority) PROPS: Rope bucket well, wooden bucket, prayer beads, bamboo axe, stone courtyard, rooftop tiles, incense smoke ENVIRONMENT: Mountain temple complex—courtyard → prayer hall → well → training square → rooftops → bamboo forest → dorm room COLOR: Dawn gold → harsh noon white → sunset amber CAMERA: Single uninterrupted 24mm Steadicam, fast whip transitions, gravity-defying follow, no cuts 1 (0–2s) DAWN WAKE Camera glides through temple roof gap into dorm. Orange cat monk jolts awake to loud birds. He freezes... then performs an exaggerated full-body stretch that briefly distorts his silhouette before snapping back. 2 (2–4s) PRAYER HALL ENTRY He rushes straight into black-robed chanting monks. They recite in dull unison. He tries to chant—mouth moving too slow—head dips mid-syllable, almost asleep while standing. 3 (4–5.5s) WELL SNAP ACTION Hard whip pan to courtyard well. He yanks rope instantly—bucket rockets up, water splashes camera. He wipes face aggressively, fully rebooted. 4 (5.5–7.5s) TRAINING SQUARE MISFIRE Camera swings into white-robed training monks. They strike in formation. He joins late, misreads rhythm, and accidentally redirects every punch—monks scatter outward in synchronized slow-motion confusion. 5 (7.5–8.5s) ELDER INTERRUPTION Elder red-robed master appears frame edge. Instant freeze. Orange monk bows too fast, overshoots balance, slides sideways in panic respect. 6 (8.5–10s) ROOFTOP LAUNCH He bolts upward. Camera tilts and follows as he runs wall-to-roof seamlessly, robe flaring. Tiles crack under rapid steps. 7 (10–11.5s) BAMBOO FOREST AXE BURST Whip transition lands him in forest. He grabs axe mid-motion and chops wood at insane speed—each swing splitting logs and launching chips like ricocheting projectiles. 8 (11.5–13s) SUNSET FATIGUE RUN Lighting shifts to amber. Same continuous camera tracks him looping tasks—run, chop, stumble recover. Motion stays fast but posture collapses slightly each step. 9 (13–14.5s) RETURN PASS He walks back through temple gate. Other monks salute. He tries to respond properly but only manages delayed, tired nods while still moving. 10 (14.5–15s) BED DROP END Camera follows into dorm. He collapses instantly onto mat. Eyes close mid-fall. Final frame holds on stillness as wind chime rings once. SFX: playful shakuhachi + brisk percussion engine, comedic taiko “bonk” hits on monk impacts, rope snap + water splash burst at well, fast wooden clack for training chaos, bamboo crack percussion in forest, ending with soft koto + single wind chime decay into silence. #sd2 #seedance #aivideo #CatsLover

(made with Seedance 2.0 on 
@nemovideoai
 )
Prompt share 

DAY STRUCTURE: 15s / 148 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 3D slapstick wuxia-animal comedy

TONE: disciplined temple routine collapsing into chaotic micro-mayhem
SUBJECT: Orange cat monk in worn grey dao robe, agile but constantly sleep-deprived
CAST: Black-robed chanting cat monks (low-energy), White training monks (overconfident), Elder red-robed master cat (silent authority)
PROPS: Rope bucket well, wooden bucket, prayer beads, bamboo axe, stone courtyard, rooftop tiles, incense smoke
ENVIRONMENT: Mountain temple complex—courtyard → prayer hall → well → training square → rooftops → bamboo forest → dorm room
COLOR: Dawn gold → harsh noon white → sunset amber
CAMERA: Single uninterrupted 24mm Steadicam, fast whip transitions, gravity-defying follow, no cuts

1 (0–2s) DAWN WAKE
Camera glides through temple roof gap into dorm. Orange cat monk jolts awake to loud birds. He freezes… then performs an exaggerated full-body stretch that briefly distorts his silhouette before snapping back.

2 (2–4s) PRAYER HALL ENTRY
He rushes straight into black-robed chanting monks. They recite in dull unison. He tries to chant—mouth moving too slow—head dips mid-syllable, almost asleep while standing.

3 (4–5.5s) WELL SNAP ACTION
Hard whip pan to courtyard well. He yanks rope instantly—bucket rockets up, water splashes camera. He wipes face aggressively, fully rebooted.

4 (5.5–7.5s) TRAINING SQUARE MISFIRE
Camera swings into white-robed training monks. They strike in formation. He joins late, misreads rhythm, and accidentally redirects every punch—monks scatter outward in synchronized slow-motion confusion.

5 (7.5–8.5s) ELDER INTERRUPTION
Elder red-robed master appears frame edge. Instant freeze. Orange monk bows too fast, overshoots balance, slides sideways in panic respect.

6 (8.5–10s) ROOFTOP LAUNCH
He bolts upward. Camera tilts and follows as he runs wall-to-roof seamlessly, robe flaring. Tiles crack under rapid steps.

7 (10–11.5s) BAMBOO FOREST AXE BURST
Whip transition lands him in forest. He grabs axe mid-motion and chops wood at insane speed—each swing splitting logs and launching chips like ricocheting projectiles.

8 (11.5–13s) SUNSET FATIGUE RUN
Lighting shifts to amber. Same continuous camera tracks him looping tasks—run, chop, stumble recover. Motion stays fast but posture collapses slightly each step.

9 (13–14.5s) RETURN PASS
He walks back through temple gate. Other monks salute. He tries to respond properly but only manages delayed, tired nods while still moving.

10 (14.5–15s) BED DROP END
Camera follows into dorm. He collapses instantly onto mat. Eyes close mid-fall. Final frame holds on stillness as wind chime rings once.

SFX: playful shakuhachi + brisk percussion engine, comedic taiko “bonk” hits on monk impacts, rope snap + water splash burst at well, fast wooden clack for training chaos, bamboo crack percussion in forest, ending with soft koto + single wind chime decay into silence.

#sd2 #seedance #aivideo #CatsLover

prompts.text: Big heart behind that cat attitude (created by Seedance 2 on @wavespeed_ai ) Prompt share Seedance 2 Prompt (15 seconds total, each shot ~0.6–1.2s) Cinematic action-comedy with classical martial arts flair, stylized animal kingdom rural village, surrounded by reflective rice paddies, soft morning mist, warm sunlight diffused through clouds, dynamic camera, highly choreographed physical action, grounded yet fluid movement, practical stunt-inspired choreography, subtle humor. S1 (0.9s) Wide shot: A chubby orange cat wearing a bamboo hat and gray Taoist robe walks calmly along a narrow path between rice fields, water reflecting the sky and distant wooden houses. S2 (0.8s) Tracking shot: Groups of raccoon-like villagers in 17th-century European peasant clothing pause their work, turning to stare at the cat with puzzled expressions. S3 (0.9s) Close-up: Two raccoon villagers lean in, whispering to each other suspiciously, eyes darting toward the orange cat. S4 (0.7s) Upward tilt: On a second-floor wooden balcony, an elderly black bear lady wearing a white wig and simple peasant dress hangs laundry. S5 (0.8s) Accident: She bumps into a flower pot—time slows—the pot tips over the edge. S6 (0.7s) Falling shot: The flower pot drops rapidly toward a small white rabbit in ragged beggar clothes standing below, unaware. S7 (0.8s) Reaction: The bear lady gasps and shouts in panic, reaching out helplessly. S8 (1.0s) Action trigger: The orange cat’s eyes sharpen—instant movement—he pivots and sprints. S9 (1.0s) Parkour sequence: He steps onto a wooden cart, kicks off a wall, then rebounds between vertical surfaces in a fluid, multi-step aerial path. S10 (1.0s) Mid-air precision: Body twisting, robe flowing, he extends one arm and catches the falling flower pot mid-air, perfectly timed. S11 (0.9s) Descent: Using momentum, he flips and lands lightly on the ground, maintaining balance effortlessly. S12 (0.8s) Gentle beat: With his free hand, he casually pats the little white rabbit’s head, reassuring and calm. S13 (1.0s) Reaction shot: The black bear lady clutches her chest in relief, then smiles gratefully. S14 (1.0s) Crowd response: The raccoon villagers break into delighted applause, earlier suspicion replaced with admiration. S15 (1.2s) Final shot: The orange cat adjusts his bamboo hat slightly, standing composed as ripples move through the rice paddies, a subtle confident aura as he looks forward. Motion & Effects: Highly detailed physical choreography, grounded multi-step parkour, precise timing, cloth simulation on robe, environmental interaction (walls, cart, ground), soft motion blur, cinematic camera flow (tracking, tilt, orbit), light comedic tone blended with elegant martial arts action. #sd2 #seedance #aivideo #CatsLover You can access Seedance 2 on https:// wavespeed.ai/models/bytedan ce/seedance-2.0/text-to-video?ref=shaochiu ...

prompts.text: Sun Wukong is my favorite legendary figure. (made with Seedance 2.0 on @yapper_so ) Prompt share Cinematic hyper-dynamic fast-paced multi-shot sequence, epic mythological battlefield, IMAX film simulation, 35mm Panavision lens, f/4, heavy cinematic color grading, dramatic contrast between dark necrotic tones and radiant golden divine light. Shot 1: Extreme close-up on Sun Wukong’s face, covered in dirt and blood, golden eyes flickering with exhaustion yet defiance. His fur is matted, his breathing heavy. He kneels in the center of a ruined battlefield, his golden staff cracked and planted into the ground for support. Around him, countless skeletal warriors slowly close in, their hollow eyes glowing with eerie green fire. Shot 2: Rapid shaky handheld shot circling Wukong. The skeletal army tightens its formation, bones clattering, rusted weapons scraping. Wukong struggles to stand, gripping his staff, as the undead swarm prepares to strike from all directions. Shot 3: Low-angle shot from behind Wukong. Just as the skeletons lunge forward, a faint golden glow begins to emerge behind him, cutting through the darkness like dawn breaking through a storm. Shot 4: Sudden explosive bloom of radiant golden light. A towering Buddha manifestation appears behind Wukong, विशाल and serene, radiating infinite divine energy. The battlefield is instantly bathed in warm, overwhelming golden luminosity. Shot 5: Fast upward tilt. Rows upon rows of celestial soldiers materialize in the sky and on the ground behind the Buddha—heavenly generals clad in ornate golden armor, divine banners flowing, weapons shining with sacred light. Shot 6: Whip-pan across the battlefield. The skeletons freeze mid-attack, their bodies trembling under the pressure of the divine aura. Golden light surges outward like a tidal wave. Shot 7: Ultra-fast sequence of disintegration shots. The skeletal army is instantly reduced to ash—bones crack, dissolve, and scatter into glowing dust, evaporating into nothingness under the overwhelming holy radiance. Shot 8: Wide epic drone pull-back. Wukong stands silhouetted in front of the colossal golden Buddha and the vast heavenly army. The battlefield, once dark and corrupted, is now purified, glowing with divine light. Golden particles drift through the air like sacred snow. Final frame: Freeze in epic tension—Wukong gripping his staff, head slightly bowed, while behind him the Buddha and celestial army radiate infinite power, dominating the horizon. #sd2 #seedance #aivideo #RPG

Shot 1: Extreme close-up on Sun Wukong’s face, covered in dirt and blood, golden eyes flickering with exhaustion yet defiance. His fur is matted, his breathing heavy. He kneels in the center of a ruined battlefield, his golden staff cracked and planted into the ground for support. Around him, countless skeletal warriors slowly close in, their hollow eyes glowing with eerie green fire.

Shot 2: Rapid shaky handheld shot circling Wukong. The skeletal army tightens its formation, bones clattering, rusted weapons scraping. Wukong struggles to stand, gripping his staff, as the undead swarm prepares to strike from all directions.

Shot 3: Low-angle shot from behind Wukong. Just as the skeletons lunge forward, a faint golden glow begins to emerge behind him, cutting through the darkness like dawn breaking through a storm.

Shot 4: Sudden explosive bloom of radiant golden light. A towering Buddha manifestation appears behind Wukong, विशाल and serene, radiating infinite divine energy. The battlefield is instantly bathed in warm, overwhelming golden luminosity.

Shot 5: Fast upward tilt. Rows upon rows of celestial soldiers materialize in the sky and on the ground behind the Buddha—heavenly generals clad in ornate golden armor, divine banners flowing, weapons shining with sacred light.

Shot 6: Whip-pan across the battlefield. The skeletons freeze mid-attack, their bodies trembling under the pressure of the divine aura. Golden light surges outward like a tidal wave.

Shot 7: Ultra-fast sequence of disintegration shots. The skeletal army is instantly reduced to ash—bones crack, dissolve, and scatter into glowing dust, evaporating into nothingness under the overwhelming holy radiance.

Shot 8: Wide epic drone pull-back. Wukong stands silhouetted in front of the colossal golden Buddha and the vast heavenly army. The battlefield, once dark and corrupted, is now purified, glowing with divine light. Golden particles drift through the air like sacred snow.

Final frame: Freeze in epic tension—Wukong gripping his staff, head slightly bowed, while behind him the Buddha and celestial army radiate infinite power, dominating the horizon.

prompts.text: I just tested this prompt with my own version in Seedance 2 Freepik Main prompt credit @umesh_ai The camera rockets up from beneath a burning battlefield trench, tearing past shattered stone pillars, broken siege engines, and falling embers, then whips into a downward tilt to reveal a vast war-torn valley below in full violent eruption—armies colliding, fire lines spreading, and massive explosions ripping through the ground. At the edge of a разрушed fortress cliff stands a warrior woman in dark, battle-scarred armor, utterly fearless, gazing into the chaos below as if commanding the war itself. The shot continues in one fluid move: the camera arcs past her shoulder, ash and sparks streaking across frame, then spirals downward around the cliff in a tightening circle, revealing scale—burning catapults, collapsing towers, soldiers scattering like ants, and distant shadowy war beasts moving through smoke and fire. The spiral tightens, speed increasing, wind roaring harder, battlefield sound swelling—metal clashes, distant screams, thunder rolling across a blood-red sky. Then the camera rises slightly into a final close, frontal reveal of her face—wind-whipped, streaked with ash and sweat, completely calm, eyes locked forward, burning with cold determination as firelight flickers across her expression.

Seedance 2.0 Prompt:

FORMAT: 15s / 145 BPM / beat-synced jumps
CHARACTER: @[image1], continuously moving forward, outfit changes with each jump, actively part of each game world
CAMERA: frontal tracking, eye-level, full-body, moving backward with the character
COLOR GRADE: Hyperreal Pop Look

TRIGGER: clearly visible finger snap in frame center, strong motion, brief micro pause before snap → instant transition
RULE: New outfit with each jump, forward motion never stops, speed gradually increases (walk → fast walk → run → panic run → slow)

JUMP_MODE: game world
SEQUENCE:
start in home interior, character sitting and playing a game, slight frustration, drops controller, stands up, begins moving forward → first snap → trigger

1: fantasy RPG forest, character as adventurer, walking with purpose, distant creature reacts → trigger  
2: dungeon corridor, character holding torch, navigating traps while moving → trigger  
3: FPS battlefield, character as soldier, bullets pass, tactical forward movement → trigger  
4: racing track, character as racer on foot between cars, dodging vehicles → trigger  
5: survival island, character scavenging while moving, animal rush → trigger  
6: zombie zone, character pushing through, zombies reach out, keeps running → trigger  
7: stealth mission base, character sneaking past guards, alarm triggers mid-move → trigger  
8: sci-fi corridor, character dodging laser grids, fast precise movement → trigger  
9: boss arena, character targeted by boss attack, evasive movement → trigger  
10: extreme boss phase, shockwave forces stumble, unstable run → forced trigger  
11: glitch world, character partially glitching, physics breaking around → forced trigger  
12: empty dev/test map, no threats, character slows down, breathing stabilizes while still moving forward

FINAL:
continues moving forward, performs the same snap again → seamless loop

It is not just about generating a clip. It is about giving creators a better way to build videos with more intention, structure, and control.

Here are 3 prompts to try:

prompts.author: @tussiwe
prompts.text: A solo cave explorer descends on a rope into a vertical ice cave in the Greenland glacier, their headlamp the only light source. As they descend, the ice walls around them glow from within, a deep electric blue that intensifies with depth. The camera descends with them, looking upward to see the entry hole shrinking above, then looking downward into the blue void below. They land on an ice floor 80 meters down and unclip from the rope. Their torch sweeps across the cave and reveals an enormous underground chamber, cathedral in scale, with ice formations the size of buildings hanging from the ceiling like frozen chandeliers. In the center of the chamber, perfectly preserved in a block of clear ice three meters tall, is a sailing ship. 18th century. Fully intact. Rigging, masts, name plate visible: The Erebus. The explorer walks slowly toward it, breath misting in the cold. They press their gloved hand flat against the ice surface. Inside, through the ice, the ship's wheel turns one degree on its own. Cinematic arctic adventure aesthetic, bioluminescent ice color grade, ultra-realistic ice surface and refraction detail, building wonder to impossible discovery, expedition documentary meets supernatural atmosphere.

prompts.author: @umesh_ai
prompts.text: A one-take begins in extreme close-up on a Stone Age hand gripping a rough flint tool. The camera rotates slowly around the hand as the tool transforms continuously and almost instantly through human history: flint knife to polished spearhead, bronze blade, iron hammer, chisel, quill, compass, telescope, mechanical wrench, fountain pen, soldering iron, keyboard, smartphone, then a gesture controlling floating AI interfaces in midair. The hand ages, changes, scars, skin tone, clothing, and era, but the grip and movement stay continuous. Around it, the blurred environment transforms too: cave wall paintings, mud-brick settlement, forge, library, ship deck, workshop, factory, laboratory, server room, and intelligent future workspace. Each transformation must feel like one invention leading naturally to the next. The story is humanity learning to shape the world with increasing precision. Final reveal: the hand opens, no longer gripping a tool but guiding a luminous AI-generated model of Earth, showing the shift from surviving nature to collaborating with intelligence itself.

prompts.author: @AIwithSynthia
prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 on @nsketchai Prompt A surreal battlefield in the sky: floating rock islands drifting through a thunderstorm, clouds swirling below like an ocean. The masked ronin dashes across the drifting platforms, pursued by a colossal winged beast whose chest is a swirling vortex of storm clouds and lightning. The camera hurtles from island to island, struggling to keep up as rocks tilt, spin, and crumble away beneath them. Every wingbeat sends shockwaves through the air, shaking the frame and blowing debris and rain straight into the viewer's face. Rapid handheld cuts capture the ronin leaping impossible gaps, sword carving arcs of light that briefly cut through the darkness. The finale shows the camera diving behind him as he jumps off the last crumbling rock, riding a bolt of lightning directly into the monster's chest vortex with a final, all-or-nothing slash that explodes the storm from within and clears the sky in a blinding flash.

prompts.author: @egeberkina
prompts.text: Style 100% real-life filmed texture, iPhone documentary look, handheld single take feeling, natural low-light environment, slight breathing shake, subtle focus hunting, soft sensor noise in shadows. Character Reference: Use Image1 as the exact character reference. Face, body, posture, clothing must remain identical. No stylization drift. Environment A dark living room at night. Only light source: a TV screen flickering. Minimal furniture. Quiet atmosphere. Hook (0–3s) The TV glitches. For a split second, something is off. Then the room flickers into a completely different reality. 13-Second One-Take Sequence 0–2s The living room suddenly transforms into a horror scene, walls decayed, dim red lighting, distant whispering. The character doesn’t react. SFX: glitch + low horror ambience 2–3s Instant flicker → now sci-fi spaceship interior. Cold blue lights. Mechanical hum. 3–5s The Netflix red glow slowly spreads from the TV across the room. Light bleeds into every surface. Music: deep cinematic build begins 5–7s The world cycles rapidly around the character: • medieval throne room • crime interrogation room • post-apocalyptic wasteland All while the character stands perfectly still in center frame. 7–9s The character slowly raises a remote. Presses pause. SFX: hard digital click 9–11s Everything freezes mid-action: • a sword mid-swing • dust particles suspended • a character mid-fall Absolute silence. 11–12s The main character looks around calmly. Steps through the frozen scene. 12–13s They sit back into their original couch position. The room snaps back to normal. On TV: “Continue Watching?” Soft Netflix red glow fades. Audio Direction SFX: glitch distortions, environment swaps, digital pause click Music: slow cinematic build → cuts to silence at pause → subtle ambient ending Important Notes Keep transitions fast but readable All environments must feel real, not stylized CGI Character must remain calm → contrast is key

prompts.tweet_text:
Just paused everything… except Netflix

Seedance 2.0 Prompt: Style 100% real-life filmed texture, iPhone documentary look, handheld single take feeling, natural low-light environment, slight breathing shake, subtle focus hunting, soft sensor noise in shadows.
Character Reference: Use Image1 as the exact character reference. Face, body, posture, clothing must remain identical. No stylization drift.
Environment A dark living room at night. Only light source: a TV screen flickering. Minimal furniture. Quiet atmosphere.
Hook (0–3s) The TV glitches.
For a split second, something is off.
Then the room flickers into a completely different reality.
13-Second One-Take Sequence
0–2s The living room suddenly transforms into a horror scene, walls decayed, dim red lighting, distant whispering.
The character doesn’t react.
SFX: glitch + low horror ambience
2–3s Instant flicker → now sci-fi spaceship interior.
Cold blue lights. Mechanical hum.
3–5s The Netflix red glow slowly spreads from the TV across the room.
Light bleeds into every surface.
Music: deep cinematic build begins
5–7s The world cycles rapidly around the character:
• medieval throne room • crime interrogation room • post-apocalyptic wasteland
All while the character stands perfectly still in center frame.
7–9s The character slowly raises a remote.
Presses pause.
SFX: hard digital click
9–11s Everything freezes mid-action:
• a sword mid-swing • dust particles suspended • a character mid-fall
Absolute silence.
11–12s The main character looks around calmly.
Steps through the frozen scene.
12–13s They sit back into their original couch position.
The room snaps back to normal.
On TV: “Continue Watching?”
Soft Netflix red glow fades.
Audio Direction
SFX: glitch distortions, environment swaps, digital pause click
Music: slow cinematic build → cuts to silence at pause → subtle ambient ending
Important Notes
Keep transitions fast but readable
All environments must feel real, not stylized CGI
Character must remain calm → contrast is key

prompts.author: @drjoetw
prompts.text: Childhood nightmare unlocked...cat master fixed it (made with Seedance 2 on @nemovideoai ) Prompt share / #NemoOneShotChallenge / Seedance 2 Prompt (15 seconds total, each shot ~0.6–1.2s) Cinematic dark fairy-tale thriller with comedic twist, eerie enchanted forest, low-key lighting, cold moonlight filtering through dense trees, volumetric fog, high contrast shadows, dynamic handheld camera, expressive character animation, fast-paced storytelling. S1 (0.9s) Wide shot: An orange cat older brother in blue overalls and a gray flat cap runs barefoot through a dark forest, pulling along a white cat little sister in a dirty pink dress, both breathing heavily. S2 (0.8s) Rear tracking shot: The forest behind them echoes with distant howling wolves, shadows shifting between trees. S3 (0.9s) Forward reveal: Through the fog, a glowing candy house made of sweets appears at the end of the path, colorful and surreal against the dark woods. S4 (0.7s) Close-up: The siblings slow down, eyes wide—fear mixed with curiosity. S5 (0.8s) Door action: The orange cat cautiously pushes open the candy door, it creaks softly. S6 (0.9s) Interior wide: Inside, dim warm light reveals a strange room—giant half-open birdcage, scattered sweets, and a bed in the corner. S7 (0.8s) Close-up: On the bed lies a white-haired “grandma” in green pajamas and a white shower cap, blanket half covering her face. S8 (0.9s) Dialogue moment: The “grandma” weakly gestures toward the birdcage, implying there is cake nearby, voice soft and inviting. S9 (0.8s) Insert shot: A cake sits temptingly near the open birdcage door. S10 (1.0s) Action split: The little sister eagerly reaches for the cake, while the orange cat narrows his eyes, scanning the room. S11 (0.9s) Suspicion reveal: Close-up at the foot of the bed—a wolf tail sticks out from beneath the blanket. S12 (1.0s) Action burst: The orange cat instantly grabs a nearby large iron shovel, swings it with full force toward the “grandma’s” head. S13 (1.0s) Impact & reveal: The shower cap flies off—“grandma” leaps up in pain, revealing a ferocious wolf face, snarling before panicking. S14 (1.0s) Escape: The wolf stumbles and scrambles out the door, fleeing into the dark forest. S15 (1.2s) Final comedic beat: The orange cat scratches the back of his head proudly, while the little sister happily eats cake beside him, cheering with crumbs on her face. Motion & Effects: Dynamic chase camera, shaky handheld for tension, fast snap zooms during action, exaggerated character expressions, cloth and fur simulation, soft glow from candy elements, contrast between horror atmosphere and playful comedic timing. #sd2 #seedance #CatsLover #aivideo ( NemoVideo × Seedance 2.0 The One-Shot Challenge) Contest Info: https:// nemovideo.com/workspace/seed ance-challenge ...

Interior wide: Inside, dim warm light reveals a strange room—giant half-open birdcage, scattered sweets, and a bed in the corner.

S7 (0.8s)
Close-up: On the bed lies a white-haired “grandma” in green pajamas and a white shower cap, blanket half covering her face.

S8 (0.9s)
Dialogue moment: The “grandma” weakly gestures toward the birdcage, implying there is cake nearby, voice soft and inviting.

S9 (0.8s)
Insert shot: A cake sits temptingly near the open birdcage door.

S10 (1.0s)
Action split: The little sister eagerly reaches for the cake, while the orange cat narrows his eyes, scanning the room.

S11 (0.9s)
Suspicion reveal: Close-up at the foot of the bed—a wolf tail sticks out from beneath the blanket.

S12 (1.0s)
Action burst: The orange cat instantly grabs a nearby large iron shovel, swings it with full force toward the “grandma’s” head.

S13 (1.0s)
Impact & reveal: The shower cap flies off—“grandma” leaps up in pain, revealing a ferocious wolf face, snarling before panicking.

S14 (1.0s)
Escape: The wolf stumbles and scrambles out the door, fleeing into the dark forest.

S15 (1.2s)
Final comedic beat: The orange cat scratches the back of his head proudly, while the little sister happily eats cake beside him, cheering with crumbs on her face.

Motion & Effects:
Dynamic chase camera, shaky handheld for tension, fast snap zooms during action, exaggerated character expressions, cloth and fur simulation, soft glow from candy elements, contrast between horror atmosphere and playful comedic timing.

(made with @nemovideoai Seedance 2) Prompt share STORY FORMAT: 15s / 150 BPM / MULTI-CUT / Shaw Brothers-style wuxia horror-comedy / exaggerated melodrama and slapstick payoff TONE: eerie suspense → frantic chase → over-the-top wuxia escape → absurd comedic reversal SETTING: Nighttime snowy coniferous forest, heavy snowfall, cold blue tones, Mount Fuji looming in the background, howling wind CHARACTER: Orange cat ronin wearing a traditional 16th-century Japanese straw hat (kasa), worn kimono, holding a wooden staff in one hand and a flickering lantern in the other White cat as a Yuki-onna spirit: long messy hair, glowing blue eyes, pale expression, wearing a thin translucent light-blue kimono, floating in the air with a sinister aura SCENE: Wide shot: The orange cat struggles through deep snow, each step heavy, breath visible in the freezing air. The lantern flickers violently in the wind. Suddenly, the wind stops. Silence. A ghostly figure slowly materializes ahead—floating above the snow. Close-up: The white cat Yuki-onna, hair drifting unnaturally, eyes glowing bright blue, a twisted smile forming. The orange cat freezes, trembling, voice shaking: “Miss... who... who are you...?” The white cat tilts her head, then lets out a chilling, playful laugh: “I am the Snow Woman... and now that you’ve seen me... you’re finished.” The wind HOWLS again— Instantly, the orange cat SCREAMS and bolts away. CHASE SEQUENCE (fast cuts, Shaw Brothers wuxia style): — The orange cat leaps onto a tree trunk with light-foot kung fu, kicking off and flying to another tree — He spins mid-air, barely dodging the white cat who glides smoothly after him, closing distance rapidly — He dives behind a large rock, holding his breath— The white cat slowly floats past... then suddenly snaps her head backward unnaturally — He yelps and launches away again The white cat accelerates, flying faster, robes fluttering violently, her laughter echoing through the forest “I can see you... you can’t escape...” — The orange cat sprints across snow, slips, rolls, then recovers with a dramatic wuxia flip — He jumps between trees again, but his movements grow slower, exhausted Final escape: He bursts out onto the edge of a cliff— He stops. No way forward. Heavy breathing. Snow falling. Silence. He slowly turns around, gripping his staff, forcing courage: “...Fine. I’ll face you.” The white cat slowly descends from the sky, drifting closer... closer... almost within reach— Suddenly— The orange cat pulls out a can from his robe—labeled clearly: “CAT MASTER” He shouts dramatically: “I’M USING MY FINAL MOVE!!” The white cat instantly freezes—eyes LOCK onto the can In a blur—she SNATCHES it mid-air Her expression instantly flips from evil to crazed excitement “FOOD?!” She lands and begins DEVOURING the can wildly, completely ignoring everything else The orange cat stares for half a second—then grins “Got you.” He steps forward— And delivers an exaggerated, full-force wuxia kick “HYAAAH!!” The white cat SCREAMS dramatically as she flies backward—still clutching the can— “MY FOOOOOOD—!!” She disappears off the cliff into darkness Long silence Snow continues to fall Final shot: The orange cat stands at the cliff edge, adjusts his straw hat, then turns to the camera with a smug grin “Never underestimate... CAT MASTER.” #sd2 #seedance2 #CatsLover #aivideo

prompts.tweet_text:
Cat master vs snow lady—how to survive? 
(made with 
@nemovideoai
 Seedance 2)
Prompt share 

STORY FORMAT: 15s / 150 BPM / MULTI-CUT / Shaw Brothers-style wuxia horror-comedy / exaggerated melodrama and slapstick payoff

TONE: eerie suspense → frantic chase → over-the-top wuxia escape → absurd comedic reversal

SETTING: Nighttime snowy coniferous forest, heavy snowfall, cold blue tones, Mount Fuji looming in the background, howling wind

CHARACTER:
Orange cat ronin wearing a traditional 16th-century Japanese straw hat (kasa), worn kimono, holding a wooden staff in one hand and a flickering lantern in the other
White cat as a Yuki-onna spirit: long messy hair, glowing blue eyes, pale expression, wearing a thin translucent light-blue kimono, floating in the air with a sinister aura

SCENE:

Wide shot: The orange cat struggles through deep snow, each step heavy, breath visible in the freezing air. The lantern flickers violently in the wind.

Suddenly, the wind stops. Silence.

A ghostly figure slowly materializes ahead—floating above the snow.

Close-up: The white cat Yuki-onna, hair drifting unnaturally, eyes glowing bright blue, a twisted smile forming.

The orange cat freezes, trembling, voice shaking:
“Miss… who… who are you…?”

The white cat tilts her head, then lets out a chilling, playful laugh:
“I am the Snow Woman… and now that you’ve seen me… you’re finished.”

The wind HOWLS again—

Instantly, the orange cat SCREAMS and bolts away.

CHASE SEQUENCE (fast cuts, Shaw Brothers wuxia style):
— The orange cat leaps onto a tree trunk with light-foot kung fu, kicking off and flying to another tree
— He spins mid-air, barely dodging the white cat who glides smoothly after him, closing distance rapidly
— He dives behind a large rock, holding his breath—
The white cat slowly floats past… then suddenly snaps her head backward unnaturally
— He yelps and launches away again

The white cat accelerates, flying faster, robes fluttering violently, her laughter echoing through the forest

“I can see you… you can’t escape…”

— The orange cat sprints across snow, slips, rolls, then recovers with a dramatic wuxia flip
— He jumps between trees again, but his movements grow slower, exhausted

Final escape: He bursts out onto the edge of a cliff—

He stops. No way forward.

Heavy breathing. Snow falling. Silence.

He slowly turns around, gripping his staff, forcing courage:
“…Fine. I’ll face you.”

The white cat slowly descends from the sky, drifting closer… closer… almost within reach—

Suddenly—

The orange cat pulls out a can from his robe—labeled clearly: “CAT MASTER”

He shouts dramatically:
“I’M USING MY FINAL MOVE!!”

The white cat instantly freezes—eyes LOCK onto the can

In a blur—she SNATCHES it mid-air

Her expression instantly flips from evil to crazed excitement

“FOOD?!”

She lands and begins DEVOURING the can wildly, completely ignoring everything else

The orange cat stares for half a second—then grins

“Got you.”

He steps forward—

And delivers an exaggerated, full-force wuxia kick

“HYAAAH!!”

The white cat SCREAMS dramatically as she flies backward—still clutching the can—

“MY FOOOOOOD—!!”

She disappears off the cliff into darkness

Long silence

Snow continues to fall

Final shot:
The orange cat stands at the cliff edge, adjusts his straw hat, then turns to the camera with a smug grin

“Never underestimate… CAT MASTER.”

#sd2 #seedance2 #CatsLover #aivideo

prompts.text: Cat master’s girlfriend? built different This is a little animation gift for Creatureberry @BerryBattyToys (made with @yapper_so Seedance 2.0) Prompt share Seedance 2 Prompt (15 seconds total, each shot ~0.6–1.2s) Cinematic fantasy elegance with mystical action, enchanted forest rose garden, Mount Fuji in the background, soft golden sunlight mixed with magical glow, drifting petals, ethereal atmosphere, smooth cinematic camera, graceful yet powerful energy effects. S1 (0.9s)Wide shot: A white cat princess with traditional Japanese royal hairstyle walks gracefully through a blooming rose garden in a forest, Mount Fuji visible in the distance under a clear sky. S2 (0.8s)Medium tracking shot: She gently hums an English melody, holding a golden glowing wand, brushing past roses as petals drift in the air. S3 (0.9s)Close-up: Her serene expression, soft smile, golden light reflecting in her eyes as she admires the flowers. S4 (0.7s)Atmosphere shift: The wind subtly changes, petals scatter faster, shadows deepen. S5 (0.8s)Reveal: A group of hyenas dressed as Japanese ronin step out from the bushes, slowly surrounding her. S6 (0.9s)Wide encirclement shot: The hyenas tighten the circle, gripping their weapons, tension rising. S7 (0.8s)Reaction: The white cat remains calm, lifting her wand slightly, expression turning confident. S8 (1.0s)Hero moment: She raises the wand high, golden light intensifying, robes flowing gently. S9 (1.0s)Incantation: She chants a clear English spell about banishing evil spirits, voice echoing softly through the garden. S10 (1.0s)Magic release: The wand emits a radiant golden aura that expands outward like a wave of light. S11 (0.9s)Impact: The aura strikes the hyenas—dark, smoky evil spirit energy bursts out from their bodies, being forcefully expelled. S12 (0.9s)Supernatural effect: The hyenas stagger as if their souls are shaken loose, black mist pulled away and scattered into the air. S13 (0.8s)Resolution: One by one, the hyenas collapse onto the ground, unconscious. S14 (1.0s)Aftermath: The garden returns to calm, petals drifting slowly again, golden particles fading. S15 (1.2s)Final shot: The white cat turns her head toward the camera with quiet confidence, giving a gentle, elegant smile, wand softly glowing in her hand. Motion & Effects:Elegant camera flow, soft slow-motion petals, glowing particle systems, expanding magical aura waves, contrast between dark smoky energy and warm golden light, smooth transitions, refined and graceful character animation. #sd2 #seedance #aivideo #CatsLover Seedance 2 PRO available here: https:// yapper.so/?via=shao-chiu

prompts.tweet_text:
Cat master vs father-in-law—straight chaos 
(made with 
@yapper_so
 Seedance 2)
Prompt share 

1990s Japanese TV drama style. A white cat (daughter, wearing a pink dress) sits beside her boyfriend, an orange cat (wearing a gray suit). Next to the father, a black bear (wearing casual clothes), sits the mother, a white rabbit (wearing a kimono). All four characters speak entirely in English. A 15-second multi-cut scene that builds awkward tension and erupts into absurd comedy.
A typical cramped Japanese dining room, with a table packed full of homemade dishes.
The four characters are tightly squeezed around the small table. The orange cat boyfriend sits stiffly, forcing a nervous smile. The black bear father crosses his arms, glaring intensely at him with growing suspicion.
Breaking the heavy silence, the daughter (white cat) beams with excitement and points proudly at her boyfriend:
“Dad! I want you to meet my boyfriend!”
The mother (white rabbit) smiles gently and pats the father’s shoulder, trying to calm him down:
“Dear… please don’t look so scary.”
The father slowly lowers his head. A long, ominous silence. Then suddenly—
He SLAMS the table, stands up violently, and roars:
“BOYFRIEND?!”
In an instant, chaos explodes. The black bear lunges across the table and starts wildly swinging at the orange cat. Plates fly into the air, food scatters everywhere in exaggerated slow motion. The orange cat desperately dodges and shields himself, shouting:
“WAIT—SIR—PLEASE—!”
In the corner, the white cat daughter and the white rabbit mother cling to each other, trembling and crying in panic:
“Dad, stop!!”
“This is too much!!”
The scene ends in full slapstick mayhem: overturned table, food everywhere, the bear still chasing the orange cat around the tiny room as everything collapses into absurd, explosive comedy.

prompts.text: Shot 1 (00: 00–00:01) – MS, Dolly in + Whip Pan A white-haired sorceress stands in an ancient archive filled with hanging talismans and bells, painting a sigil. Dark mist erupts from the ground—she reacts instantly, dodging and countering with a sweeping brush strike. VFX: Distorted, pulsing shadow mist. SFX: Paper rustle, soft bells, low hum. Shot 2 (00: 01–00:02) – CU, Fast Push-in Her eyes glow. With a flick of her wrist, she draws sharp blue sigil strokes mid-air, forming blade-like trails. VFX: Intersecting cold-blue energy lines. SFX: Sharp air cuts, energy charge. Shot 3 (00: 02–00:03) – WS, Crane Up Talismans swirl violently. Layered circular sigils form beneath her feet. A shadow entity emerges but is blocked by the rotating barrier. VFX: Multi-layer rotating sigil rings, vortex of talismans. SFX: Deep resonance, swirling wind. Shot 4 (00: 03–00:04) – MFS, Orbit Tracking Scene shifts to a fractured sky. She steps on floating sigils; her brush extends into a glowing chain of runes that lashes toward the entity. VFX: Flickering rune-chain light. SFX: Air tearing, chain clinks. Shot 5 (00: 04–00:06) – LS, Chase Cam Amid storm clouds and a broken moon, she rides the rune chain through the air, pursuing the fleeing shadow. VFX: Rolling clouds, blue-white trails vs black mist. SFX: Roaring wind, distant thunder. Shot 6 (00: 06–00:07) – CU, Slide She taps nodes along the chain, activating hidden purple sigils that pulse with new energy. VFX: Sequential purple node illumination, pulse flow. SFX: Light clicks, energy hum. Shot 7 (00: 07–00:08) – MCU, Static She closes in and strikes the entity’s forehead. A burst of light—its body distorts, a complex seal appears on its chest. VFX: Purple-blue flash, rotating seal. SFX: Sharp burst, distorted screech. Shot 8 (00: 08–00:09) – WS, Dive Shot Both streak downward like meteors, piercing clouds toward an ancient stone altar. VFX: Comet-like light trails. SFX: Air screech, compression. Shot 9 (00: 09–00:10) – WS, Impact Static They crash. Dust erupts. She slams her hand down—radiating sigils crack across the ground. VFX: Glowing fractures spreading outward. SFX: Heavy impact, stone cracking. Shot 10 (00: 10–00:12) – LS, Pull Back A massive 3D sigil array rises, forming layered barriers that trap the entity at the center. She stands calmly outside. VFX: Expanding geometric barriers, drifting particles. SFX: Low steady resonance. Shot 11 (00: 12–00:13) – CU, Static She forms a hand seal and whispers: “Seal.” VFX: Light particles contract. SFX: Soft chant, energy tightening. Shot 12 (00: 13–00:15) – CU, Fade Out Eyes closed, she meditates as all light fades, leaving faint residual glow in silence. VFX: Light dissipates into darkness. SFX: Gentle wind, fading echo.

prompts.text: A vintage steam train from the 1920s moves through a dense Scottish Highland fog at midnight, its headlamp cutting a yellow cone through the grey. The camera begins in a wide exterior shot tracking alongside the train as it moves, the Highland landscape barely visible beyond the fog. Cut to inside: the passenger cars are fully lit with warm amber light but completely empty. Seats are set for passengers, cups of tea still steaming on fold-out tables, a newspaper open and held in place as if someone just set it down. The camera moves through the cars one by one, each identically abandoned mid-moment. In the last car, a single passenger sits facing away from the camera, a woman in period dress, completely still. The camera creeps forward down the aisle toward her. As it reaches the seat directly behind her, the train enters a tunnel and everything goes black. The train exits the other side of the tunnel. The last car is now empty. Her teacup steams on the table. The train continues into the fog. Cinematic gothic atmosphere, desaturated Highland palette with warm amber interior contrast, ultra-realistic fog simulation, silence punctuated only by train sounds, slow burn psychological horror aesthetic.

prompts.tweet_text:
What if a grand ballroom existed 10,000 feet above the clouds? One prompt 

"An impossibly grand Victorian ballroom floats suspended above the clouds at 10,000 feet, its walls made entirely of glass revealing an endless sky in every direction. Dozens of couples in formal evening wear waltz across a white marble floor as the sun sets on the horizon, the clouds below turning amber and violet. The camera enters through one of the glass walls in a slow glide, weaving between dancing couples without disrupting them, catching details, a diamond earring catching the last light, two gloved hands meeting for the first waltz, a champagne flute reflecting the sunset sky. The music swells and the entire ballroom begins to rise higher, the clouds falling away below, stars beginning to appear above. One couple stops dancing and walks hand in hand to the glass wall, pressing their fingertips to it and looking out at the universe around them. Camera holds on their reflection in the glass with infinite space behind them. Romantic cinematic epic aesthetic, golden hour transitioning to deep blue night, ultra-detailed period costume and architecture, sweeping orchestral score atmosphere, dreamlike weightless camera movement."

A world that cannot exist. One prompt made it real.

prompts.author: @leohuynh139
prompts.text: A high-stakes, 15-second cinematic sequence of a sorceress in a pale yellow silk gown performing a primal fire ritual on a cracked volcanic plain. The ritual culminates in the manifestation of a colossal fire lion that transcends the physical realm, turning the sky into an apocalyptic firestorm.Action Breakdown (0–15s)0–3s (The Manifestation): The shot opens with the woman slamming her hands toward the earth. The volcanic rock explodes as a 20-foot-tall lion made of roiling solar fire lunges from the fissures. Her gown whips violently in the resulting thermal blast.3–7s (The Synchronization): A rapid, low-angle orbital camera move circles the duo. The woman weaves her arms in a commanding dance; the lion mimics her movements, swiping a massive flaming paw at the camera and leaving a trail of intense heat haze and sparks across the lens.7–10s (The Compression): The woman pulls her hands together at her chest, drawing the lion’s mass inward. The beast recoils and condenses into a blinding, white-hot orb of pure energy between her palms. A dramatic snap-zoom focuses on her face, her eyes reflecting the swirling solar core.11–13s (The Shockwave): The orb detonates. A massive, golden circular shockwave ripples outward, disintegrating nearby rock pillars into dust. The lion re-emerges behind her, now three times its previous size—a gargantuan, translucent celestial titan that rears back and roars into the heavens.13–15s (The Firestorm): The celestial lion dissolves into a million falling stars. The camera pulls back into an epic wide shot, showing the woman’s tiny silhouette standing in a rain of golden embers as the storm clouds above ignite into a gargantuan, swirling fire-vortex.Technical & Atmospheric DetailsCharacter: The sorceress appears triumphant and powerful, her silhouette sharp against the blinding light. Her gown glows brilliantly, appearing almost translucent in the final explosion.The Elemental: Transitions from "liquid lava" textures (0-7s) to a "blinding star" (7-10s) and finally to a "nebula-like constellation" (11-15s).Lighting: High-contrast, cinematic lighting. The scene shifts from deep orange and black to a blinding white-out, ending in a warm, golden atmospheric glow.Sound Design: Begins with the "crunch" of earth and "roar" of fire, followed by a high-pitched ringing during the compression, and ending with a low-frequency "thoom" of the shockwave and the shimmering sound of falling embers. on @haimeta_ai

prompts.author: @guicastellanos1
prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 prompt share: Cinematic shot, HYPER-REALISTIC 8K rendering. The scene is governed by a single, unwavering rule: the SUN and SKY are photorealistic and real; EVERY OTHER ELEMENT, without exception, is a completely and consistently rendered, FULLY VOLUMETRIC, three-dimensional stained-glass art installation. The soundtrack contains NO MUSIC, only the rich, resonant, and diegetic sound effects of the environment and the characters' actions. The setting is a city street at dusk. The real sun has just set, but the sky is still filled with a deep orange and purple light. The street is made of volumetric glass cobblestones, and is flanked by towering, sculptural 3D stained-glass buildings. A Day Chaser, a bike messenger, is weaving through traffic at high speed. They are a living being, their body showing the focused, athletic posture of an experienced urban cyclist. They lean hard into a turn, their glass eyes scanning ahead for obstacles. Their bike is a functional, 3D sculpture of leaded glass and brass-toned glass fittings. As they ride, they are actively chasing the last usable light of the day, moving from the deep shadows of the buildings into the open intersections where the bright light of the real sky is still reflected on the wet glass streets. When they pass through these patches of reflected light, their body projects a fleeting, beautiful, and kinetic smear of caustics onto the 3D glass pavement. Key Visual Directives for Realism: Day Chaser Materiality (THE CORRECT LOOK): A masterpiece of stained-glass art, composed of multiple, individually crafted, stained-glass pieces, meticulously leaded together. They possess believable human features (hair, eyes, mouth) in intricate glasswork, with a sophisticated palette. Consistent 3D World: The buildings, the street, the bike, and other sculptural glass vehicles are all rendered as fully volumetric, 3D objects. Light Dynamics: The light is ambient and reflected from the sky, creating a moody, high-contrast urban scene. No mystical glowing or artificial CGI sparkles. Implied Sound (Diegetic Only): The whirring sound of the glass bike's chain and gears. The hiss of the glass tires on the wet glass cobblestones. The distant, echoing, resonant sounds of a stained-glass city at nightfall. Artistic Tone: Gritty, energetic, and cool. A scene about a living being's focused and skillful work, rigorously adhering to the core visual laws.

prompts.author: @EHuanglu
prompts.text: High-quality anime style, 2D animation. Warm, cinematic lighting with sunlight filtering through blinds. A tiny man wearing a green hoodie and blue jeans runs across a wooden floor toward a giantess. He climbs up her massive foot and leg, which are covered in black fishnet stockings, using the fishnet holes to climb. Dynamic low-angle camera following his ascent, emphasizing the colossal scale of the giantess. He climbs past her black pleated skirt and white collared shirt, scaling up her dark blue ribbed sweater. The camera pans up to reveal the giantess looking down at him. She has long brown hair, a flower hair clip, and large brown eyes. She wears a highly surprised, wide-eyed expression with a slight blush. Background is a softly blurred bedroom with a music keyboard.

prompts.author: @ertanlabs
prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 Prompt 15s / 180 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 360 POV downhill longboard run, viral energy, max chaos. SUBJECTS: First-person downhill longboard rider, front foot, deck nose, and flickering trucks appearing low in frame during drops, slides, and stair gaps. Flower pots, café chairs, scooters, cats, delivery bikes, tourists, and laundry erupt around the rider as sudden obstacles. ENVIRONMENT: Dense Mediterranean cliffside town, whitewashed stair alleys, blue shutters, tiled landings, sea-glow at the horizon, hanging laundry, tangled wires, sun-faded murals, narrow terraces, umbrellas, puddles, warm late afternoon light, deep stone shadows, layered rooftops dropping toward the coast below. MOOD: Adrenaline, max chaos, nonstop downhill street speed. COLOR LOGIC: Hyperreal Pop Look with sun-bleached whites, cobalt accents, coral signage, golden flare. CAMERA DETAILS: 360 action-cam POV, horizon-stable but brutal, nonstop forward drive, minimal roll, heavy stair vibration, sharp side and rear parallax, full-sphere chaos, no release. 0:00–0:03: POV freefalls into a steep stone stairwell, board nose rattling low in frame as the rider lands into brutal vibrating descent. A café server yanks a tray away from the line while walls, balconies, plants, and faces whip past inches away. SFX: sea wind, wheel chatter, stair hits, breath, distant crowd. 0:03–0:05: POV slashes left across a tiny tiled landing, clips past stacked flower pots, then snaps into another stair drop as hanging laundry lashes across the front hemisphere and tourists recoil. SFX: cloth slap, ceramic clink, wheel scrape, crowd gasp. 0:05–0:08: POV hammers the next staircase as a cat darts center frame and pigeons burst upward from a side ledge. The rider speed-check slides, then threads between a parked scooter and iron handrail with almost no clearance. SFX: tire chirp, wings flapping, metal rattle, stair thuds. 0:08–0:10: POV blasts over a short cobblestone gap between stair sections, trucks clacking, then drops straight into the next descending run as delivery bikes streak through the side wrap. SFX: wheel buzz, curb thump, distant horn, crowd echo. 0:10–0:13: POV attacks two tight landings and another steep stepped lane, every hit jolting the sphere as rooftops, awnings, church bells, alley mouths, and flashes of sea curl around the viewer. SFX: air rush, heavy thump, stair chatter, wind buffeting. 0:13–0:15: POV rips to a cliff overlook and throws into a savage stand-up slide, dust and tiny pebbles spraying across the lower frame while the glowing sea-town skyline blooms around the full sphere. SFX: wheel screech, gravel spray, crowd roar. Hyperreal, continuous-shot chaos, no text, no logos.

CAMERA DETAILS: 360 action-cam POV, horizon-stable but brutal, nonstop forward drive, minimal roll, heavy stair vibration, sharp side and rear parallax, full-sphere chaos, no release. 0:00–0:03: POV freefalls into a steep stone stairwell, board nose rattling low in frame as the rider lands into brutal vibrating descent. A café server yanks a tray away from the line while walls, balconies, plants, and faces whip past inches away. SFX: sea wind, wheel chatter, stair hits, breath, distant crowd. 0:03–0:05: POV slashes left across a tiny tiled landing, clips past stacked flower pots, then snaps into another stair drop as hanging laundry lashes across the front hemisphere and tourists recoil. SFX: cloth slap, ceramic clink, wheel scrape, crowd gasp. 0:05–0:08: POV hammers the next staircase as a cat darts center frame and pigeons burst upward from a side ledge. The rider speed-check slides, then threads between a parked scooter and iron handrail with almost no clearance. SFX: tire chirp, wings flapping, metal rattle, stair thuds. 0:08–0:10: POV blasts over a short cobblestone gap between stair sections, trucks clacking, then drops straight into the next descending run as delivery bikes streak through the side wrap. SFX: wheel buzz, curb thump, distant horn, crowd echo. 0:10–0:13: POV attacks two tight landings and another steep stepped lane, every hit jolting the sphere as rooftops, awnings, church bells, alley mouths, and flashes of sea curl around the viewer. SFX: air rush, heavy thump, stair chatter, wind buffeting. 0:13–0:15: POV rips to a cliff overlook and throws into a savage stand-up slide, dust and tiny pebbles spraying across the lower frame while the glowing sea-town skyline blooms around the full sphere. SFX: wheel screech, gravel spray, crowd roar. Hyperreal, continuous-shot chaos, no text, no logos.

prompts.text: Medieval cat master: cute first, survival later (created with Seedance 2.0 on @nemovideoai ) Prompt share Seedance 2 Prompt (15 seconds total, each shot ~0.6–1.2s) Cinematic fantasy dark-comedy action, medieval European castle bedroom, warm candlelight vs cold moonlight contrast, dramatic shadows, ultra-dynamic camera, exaggerated character animation, high-detail textures, fast-paced editing, humorous tone. S1 (0.9s) Wide shot: A chubby orange cat in full medieval European knight armor stands beside a luxurious canopy bed inside a castle bedroom, moonlight spilling through wooden windows. S2 (0.8s) Close-up: On the bed, a white cat princess sleeps messily, loudly snoring, one paw casually picking her nose in an unrefined, comedic manner. S3 (0.9s) Medium shot: The orange cat shakes her urgently, armor clanking, trying to wake her up, visibly frustrated. S4 (0.7s) Close-up: The princess continues snoring, completely unfazed, bubble forming from her nose. S5 (0.8s) Cut to window: Outside the wooden window, a pair of giant glowing eyes suddenly appears in the darkness. S6 (0.9s) Reveal shot: A pink fire-breathing dragon presses its face near the window, exhaling faint smoke, eyes wide and menacing. S7 (0.8s) Reaction shot: The orange cat freezes, then instantly turns serious, gripping his longsword. S8 (1.0s) Action burst: With a powerful kick, the orange cat smashes through the wooden window, splinters flying outward. S9 (1.0s) Balcony wide shot: The cat lands on the stone balcony, facing the hovering pink dragon under moonlight. S10 (1.0s) Combat: The cat lunges forward, slashing rapidly with the longsword, sparks and motion blur streaks. S11 (0.8s) Twist: The dragon suddenly opens its mouth and bites down, swallowing the sword whole. S12 (0.9s) Close-up: The orange cat pauses, then instantly switches expression, huge sparkling eyes, puffed cheeks, exaggerated ultra-cute innocent face. S13 (1.0s) Reaction: The dragon’s fierce expression melts into confusion and softness, flames dying down. S14 (1.0s) Punchline action: In a split-second, the orange cat snaps back to normal and kicks the dragon hard, sending it tumbling off the balcony into a deep abyss. S15 (1.2s) Final close-up: The orange cat turns to camera, smirks proudly, and gives a playful left-eye wink, armor gleaming in moonlight. Motion & Effects: Fast-paced comedic timing, strong motion blur, dynamic camera swings (orbit, low-angle, snap zooms), particle effects (wood splinters, smoke, sparks), expressive character animation, seamless flow, high-impact yet humorous finish. #sd2 #seedance #CatsLover #aivideo

prompts.text: | Premium Korean romance melodrama. Early night in the same modern apartment kitchen. Keep the acting intimate and volatile, with micro-expressions, trembling breath, and emotionally precise lip sync. The emotional tone is hurt, accusation, and unresolved longing. [00:00-00:04] Tight two-shot across the kitchen island, slight handheld sway. Ha-yoon steps into Joon-seo's space and forces eye contact. HA-YOON: "You don't ignore my words, Joon-seo. You ignore my feelings." [00:04-00:08] Reverse close-up on Joon-seo. He swallows hard, jaw tight, guilt flickering behind his eyes. JOON-SEO: "I've been trying to keep everything from falling apart." [00:08-00:15] Slow push-in on Ha-yoon, then settle into a tense two-shot with both faces sharp and the background soft. HA-YOON: "Then why was I always the first thing you let go when you got busy?" He cannot answer. Let the silence hit hard. Hold on the pain in both faces. end_frame_anchor: | Both stand less than a step apart, eyes locked. Ha-yoon's chin is lifted, tears contained but visible. Joon-seo is speechless, breathing shallowly, shoulders tense, unable to look away.

prompts.text: Prompt Studio: Alien Attack, with Seedance 2.0 fast in @dreamina_ai , text to video Ultra-fast FPV shot skimming the street through a burning city at night. Alien ships drop into frame from above, flying low between skyscrapers and staying directly ahead. Their cannons charge and fire, explosions erupt in sequence along the road. The camera tilts sharply upward mid-flight, bringing the ships into full view overhead. It then banks hard into a side angle, racing alongside them as they blast the street below. The camera whips into a backward tracking motion, ships pushing forward toward the lens, firing relentlessly, shockwaves chasing the camera. A final snap into a tight follow shot behind a ship locks the motion as it continues firing into the city. Continuous motion, no cuts, ships always visible, high tension. #DreaminaCPP

prompts.author: @Mayz1169
prompts.text: Static close-up shot. A realistic human hand interacts with a flat 2D animated character of Furina — a blue and white dress anime girl with long light blue hair — inside a clear glass cup placed on a wooden table. [0-2s] The hand pinches Furina by the head and lowers her into the glass; she grabs the rim with both arms and resists, refusing to go in, while the fingers keep pressing her down. [2-4s] She loses grip and slides down the glass wall, desperately kicking and clawing at the wall trying to climb back up, but keeps slipping back to the bottom, with a surprised yelp. [4-7s] She gives up and slumps at the bottom, eyes shut, two exaggerated wide noodle-tears streaming down her cheeks, crying dramatically. [7-9s] She suddenly leaps up, shaking both fists at her sides furiously, tears still on her face, yelling angrily upward in protest — expression both crying and fuming, super cute. [9-11s] The finger reaches in and gently pats her head; she immediately stops, sits still obediently, hands clasped on her chest, looking up at the finger with big teary puppy eyes. [11-13s] The fingers pinch her head again and lift her straight up out of the glass; halfway up she tilts her head slightly, eyes half-lidded, a small smug tsundere smile on her lips. [13-15s] Fully lifted out and suspended in the air, her eyes open wide and she breaks into a big bright energetic grin, hands spread open happily, frame holds steady. AR mixed-media style: flat 2D cartoon character with full physical interaction with a real 3D glass — sliding and climbing along the glass wall, realistic glass refractions, cast shadows, and wall contact all rendered naturally. Soft warm natural lighting, super cute and heartwarming mood. #furina #genshinimpact

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 is insane. Prompt bellow inspired by @techhalla Raw mobile phone footage, vertical handheld shot, shaky cam, grainy texture. At the legendary Rucker Park basketball court at dusk, a heavy-set elderly black woman in a floral dress and sneakers is dribbling a basketball against a young, athletic streetballer in a jersey. prompts.text: SUBJECT: A tired woman in @ image1 in a loose tank top and sleep shorts, slow habitual movement. Slightly smeared eyeliner, bare feet, heavy posture, detached face. ENVIRONMENT: A cramped cluttered apartment with an unmade mattress, scattered clothes, a narrow hallway, a damp bathroom with dim tile reflections, and a tiny kitchen crowded with dirty dishes and empty bottles. Warm practical lamps mix with sickly green neon leaking through blinds and door glass, turning the rooms into a humid late-night maze. MOOD: Detached routine turns quietly uncanny, as if an unseen presence is floating above her and waiting for her to notice. COLOR LOGIC: Matrix Green Look CAMERA: POV overhead follow in a strict bird's eye view, locked directly above the top of her head at all times, perfectly centered over her body from start to finish, floating smoothly with no shake, tilt, angle drift, or side offset, passing through ceilings and door frames as one uninterrupted camera event. 24mm wide, digital clean look, locked overhead tracking package throughout. SCENE: She wakes on the mattress. Sits up under the lens. Still centered under the lens, reaches to the floor. Picks up the cigarette and lighter. Places the cigarette between her lips. Lights it. Drops the lighter on the mattress. Stands up with the cigarette still with her. Under the same overhead lock, crosses the cluttered room. The lens tracks directly above her into the narrow hallway. Enters the bathroom. Still pinned overhead, keeps the cigarette in her right hand. Extends that arm away from the running water. Leans on the sink. Turns on the tap with her left hand. Splashes water onto her face with her left hand. The overhead follow carries her back out of the bathroom into the hallway. Moves along the hallway past the bathroom door. Turns into the tiny kitchen. Still centered under the camera, keeps the cigarette with her. Reaches across the dirty dishes with her free hand. Picks up a glass from the counter. Stops exactly under the lens. Holds the cigarette in her right hand and the glass in her left hand. The lens stays fixed above her. Freezes. Looks right. Looks left. Takes a drag from the cigarette. Snaps her head straight up into the lens. Blows smoke toward the camera. Locks eye contact. SFX: lighter flick, inhale, faint city hum, refrigerator buzz, soft bare footsteps, water run. Sodium amber particles, toxic green neon reflect off tile, smoke, bottles, and damp surface.

CAMERA: POV overhead follow in a strict bird's eye view, locked directly above the top of her head at all times, perfectly centered over her body from start to finish, floating smoothly with no shake, tilt, angle drift, or side offset, passing through ceilings and door frames as one uninterrupted camera event. 24mm wide, digital clean look, locked overhead tracking package throughout.
SCENE:
She wakes on the mattress. Sits up under the lens.
Still centered under the lens, reaches to the floor. Picks up the cigarette and lighter. Places the cigarette between her lips. Lights it. Drops the lighter on the mattress. Stands up with the cigarette still with her.
Under the same overhead lock, crosses the cluttered room.
The lens tracks directly above her into the narrow hallway. Enters the bathroom.
Still pinned overhead, keeps the cigarette in her right hand. Extends that arm away from the running water. Leans on the sink. Turns on the tap with her left hand. Splashes water onto her face with her left hand.
The overhead follow carries her back out of the bathroom into the hallway. Moves along the hallway past the bathroom door. Turns into the tiny kitchen.
Still centered under the camera, keeps the cigarette with her. Reaches across the dirty dishes with her free hand. Picks up a glass from the counter.
Stops exactly under the lens. Holds the cigarette in her right hand and the glass in her left hand.
The lens stays fixed above her. Freezes. Looks right. Looks left. Takes a drag from the cigarette. Snaps her head straight up into the lens. Blows smoke toward the camera. Locks eye contact.
SFX: lighter flick, inhale, faint city hum, refrigerator buzz, soft bare footsteps, water run. Sodium amber particles, toxic green neon reflect off tile, smoke, bottles, and damp surface.

prompts.text: A 10-second cinematic scene inside the Colosseum at golden hour. A massive crowd fills the stone tiers, roaring with anticipation. The camera follows a group of gladiators entering the arena in a single continuous shot, walking slowly across the sand toward the imperial tribune. Each gladiator is distinct: a heavily armored murmillo with a crested helmet, a nimble retiarius holding a net and trident, a scarred veteran with worn leather armor, and a young fighter with a determined gaze. Dust rises under their feet as sunlight cuts through the arena, casting long dramatic shadows. The crowd cheers louder as they stop in formation and raise their weapons in salute. Caesar rises from his throne, draped in white and red robes, lifting his hand for silence. The sound of the crowd fades slightly as he speaks a short phrase in Latin with authority. The video is a single continuous shot. The characters speak Latin. When one speaks, the others keep their mouths closed. No character appears or disappears. All characters remain visible and consistent throughout the shot.

prompts.author: @ShadeLurk
prompts.text: A small white mushroom-eared creature is hurled forward from outstretched hands. It tumbles toward the camera, its white body swelling until it fills the entire frame — white flash. Chase camera locks behind the mushroom-eared creature as it rockets forward and slams into a wall of red crystalline armor. On impact it explodes — cyan crystal shards and square pixel-particles burst radially. The creature splits into several identical copies that scatter in every direction. The camera pulls straight up, revealing a circular red arena from overhead. The copies ricochet off surfaces in erratic bouncing arcs, each landing triggering a magenta or blue starburst flash. A white variant joins mid-sequence, trailing blue beam lines. The bouncing grows chaotic with overlapping hit effects. One mushroom-eared creature arcs directly past the lens, its body blocking the frame — wipe to black. A character stands behind a large golden wheel covered in ornate engravings. Both hands grip the wheel's rim and push — the wheel spins. The character grins while watching it turn. The camera starts tight on the character's hands and the spinning wheel, then slowly widens. Red carnival lamps ring the stage. Gold sparkles drift upward. Small white and black mushroom-eared creatures sit in the foreground as an audience, arms raised. The spinning golden wheel glows brighter frame by frame, bleaching to searing white. All figures become silhouettes against the expanding light. The camera pushes IN toward the light source — total whiteout. White flash erupts. A warm-colored blast wave expands outward from center screen. Smaller mushroom-eared creatures launch outward from the center in every direction. The character strikes a double peace sign as multicolored confetti rains from above.
